a428bbc6-3e40-4f81-8b0a-cb07c2add01d.description: 1-800-Baskets specializes in beautifully presented gift baskets and food hampers for every occasion, from birthdays and anniversaries to sympathy and corporate gifting. 6b92fc6d-9595-4e73-910e-ba140fcf7191.description: 1-800-Flowers.com is a leading online florist offering fresh roses, orchids, flowering plants, bouquets and gift baskets crafted by skilled florists. Send blooms and gifts to delight loved ones for any occasion, wherever they are.

6b92fc6d-9595-4e73-910e-ba140fcf7191.terms: This gift card is a prepaid payment device with a set dollar value. It is not a credit, charge or debit card, has no service fees and no expiration date. a20476be-ab28-4cc4-808f-1948c7fc1f5b.description: 18 Montrose is a UK destination for premium fashion and contemporary streetwear, bringing together standout labels for the style-conscious shopper.

Gift cards cannot be used to buy further gift cards.

9a9f38e1-2954-4b58-bb1a-946b8302d41b.description: 24symbols is an online reading service offering unlimited access to a vast library of ebooks across every genre, from classics and bestsellers to contemporary fiction and textbooks. 9a9f38e1-2954-4b58-bb1a-946b8302d41b.terms: The digital code is redeemable at 24symbols.com/activate_code and grants premium access to the 24symbols online and mobile reading platform, including unlimited books plus one audiobook per month, for the subscription term while the code is active. 43816f71-f7e7-4841-9043-d2f4becf34a3.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

85848ef4-5c98-4bdd-8486-e14ec9aebc08.terms: E-Gift Cards may be redeemed in the US and Canada on the relevant Abercrombie websites or in Abercrombie stores. Cards cannot be used to purchase other gift cards. Governed by US law. Full terms and balance inquiries at abercrombie.com.

c436d828-0a17-4e08-8fcd-fe4e67370547.intro: The helpful place for your home

Redeemable at Albertsons, Safeway, Randalls, Tom Thumb, Pavilions, Vons, Carrs, Shaw's, Star Market, Jewel-Osco, Acme, Lucky, Haggen, Andronico's, Kings and Balducci's. f98d6d17-a923-46ee-b70c-3ceef464d945.description: All Bar One is a stylish city-centre bar built for celebrating, sharing food and drink, and good times. From morning coffee to Saturday-night Espresso Martinis, with menus made for grazing on tapas or sipping standout cocktails.

f98d6d17-a923-46ee-b70c-3ceef464d945.terms: This card may not be exchanged for cash and is not a cheque guarantee, credit, debit or charge card. 7c8bf315-703f-4b6c-972d-574411c059e9.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Restrictions apply, see amazon.com/gc-legal.

d6871fff-4fa3-4e41-9cce-9b7fbd0ea608.description: Carnival Cruise Lines is The World's Most Popular Cruise Line, with a fleet of Fun Ships sailing three- to sixteen-day voyages to destinations from the Bahamas and Caribbean to Alaska, Hawaii, Europe and beyond. Use of the card constitutes acceptance of these terms. For balance enquiries, full terms and conditions, general queries and participating pub restaurants, visit greatbritishpubcard.co.uk/gift-card/. For card queries or problems, call 08435 064 006 (Mon-Fri, 09:00-17:00).

e22b964b-4812-4f8f-b673-54f3265f00b8.description: Cherry Credits is a versatile virtual currency for over 1,000 games and digital titles, including Ragnarok Online, Dragon Nest and Black Desert Online. Use it to buy games, software and items on popular platforms such as Steam and the Ubisoft Store.
e22b964b-4812-4f8f-b673-54f3265f00b8.instructions: Visit cherrycredits.com and log in to your Cherry account, or sign up free if you don't have one. Click Top Up on the menu bar, choose Cherry Credits Prepaid Card / ePIN, then enter the serial number and security code of your ePIN and click Submit. Once credited, spend your Cherry Credits with supported merchants.
e22b964b-4812-4f8f-b673-54f3265f00b8.terms: On Steam, Cherry Credits can be redeemed for Steam Wallet Codes, which work like game activation codes for over 1,800 titles. Steam Wallet Codes can be bought in select countries including Australia, Hong Kong, Indonesia, India, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, Turkey, UAE, Vietnam, Korea, Taiwan, China, Pakistan and Macau. On Ubisoft, Cherry Credits can be used to buy games via the Uplay Launcher or Ubisoft Web Store. Redemption instructions are available on the Cherry Credits website.

0b191cdc-f40a-451f-9d69-ae0effd02c4c.description: Cherry Credits is a versatile virtual currency for over 1,000 games and digital titles, including Ragnarok Online, Dragon Nest and Black Desert Online. Use it to buy games, software and items on popular platforms such as Steam and the Ubisoft Store.
0b191cdc-f40a-451f-9d69-ae0effd02c4c.instructions: Visit cherrycredits.com and log in to your Cherry account, or sign up free if you don't have one. Click Top Up on the menu bar, choose Cherry Credits Prepaid Card / ePIN, then enter the serial number and security code of your ePIN and click Submit. Once credited, spend your Cherry Credits with supported merchants.
0b191cdc-f40a-451f-9d69-ae0effd02c4c.terms: On Steam, Cherry Credits can be redeemed for Steam Wallet Codes, which work like game activation codes for over 1,800 titles. Steam Wallet Codes can be bought in select countries including Australia, Hong Kong, Indonesia, India, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, Turkey, UAE, Vietnam, Korea, Taiwan, China, Pakistan and Macau. On Ubisoft, Cherry Credits can be used to buy games via the Uplay Launcher or Ubisoft Web Store. Redemption instructions are available on the Cherry Credits website.

ee070557-a6b2-4487-ae77-1c2e8fc4d4c3.description: For those who want to leave a deliciously lasting impression, Cheryl's fresh-baked desserts and gifts are as distinctive as they are delectable. Choose from a wide selection of cookie creations, baked fresh with a guarantee of quality, freshness and beautiful presentation.
ee070557-a6b2-4487-ae77-1c2e8fc4d4c3.instructions: Redeem your gift card online at cheryls.com, where it can be used at the brands, retail stores, websites and phone orders listed at freshgift.com. Apply the card value at checkout. Please use one gift card per online order; for multiple cards, call the phone lines listed at freshgift.com.
ee070557-a6b2-4487-ae77-1c2e8fc4d4c3.terms: The gift card is a prepaid payment device with a set dollar value. It is not a credit, charge or debit card, has no service fees and no expiration date. It can be used at brands, retail stores, websites and on phone orders listed at FreshGift.com. We reserve the right to require credit card or alternate non-promotional payment information for verification, even if the gift card fully covers the order total. Gift cards may not be purchased with another gift card, gift certificate, savings pass, appreciation award, award card or rewards pass. One gift card per online order.

b93165f2-9664-496e-8262-f2e7fbfd72b7.description: The Chewy gift card is the perfect way to treat your furry friends to the best in pet care. Shop premium pet food, toys, grooming products and more at Chewy.com, a trusted name in pet supplies, with the flexibility of no expiration date.
b93165f2-9664-496e-8262-f2e7fbfd72b7.instructions: Visit Chewy.com, add your pet products to the cart, and proceed to checkout. In the payment section, enter your Chewy gift card code and click Apply, then complete your purchase with any additional payment if needed. Note that gift cards cannot be used for subscriptions, and the card does not expire.
b93165f2-9664-496e-8262-f2e7fbfd72b7.terms: Issued by Chewy Promotions LLC and redeemable by residents of the contiguous U.S. for merchandise and services at Chewy.com. Has no fees and does not expire. Not transferable and not redeemable for cash except where required by law; no refunds or returns. Protect this card like cash. Subject to the full Chewy Gift Card Terms at chewy.com/app/content/gift-cards-terms. Chewy ships only within the contiguous U.S. (Lower 48), and not to P.O. boxes, APO/FPO addresses, Alaska, Hawaii, U.S. territories or international addresses.

7624cf60-b42c-4f5c-ab92-47f1e13ade49.description: For over 30 years, Chico's has helped women look as great as they feel through amazing personal service. Its exclusively designed, private-branded collections combine fabulous style with on-trend touches, including limited-edition jackets, statement accessories and the wrinkle-free Travelers collection.
7624cf60-b42c-4f5c-ab92-47f1e13ade49.instructions: Shop online at chicos.com and enter the gift card number and PIN at checkout, or order by phone at 888.855.4986. To redeem in store, print this page and bring it to a boutique or outlet, or display the barcode, card number and PIN from your mobile device. Check your remaining balance online or by calling 888.855.4986.
7624cf60-b42c-4f5c-ab92-47f1e13ade49.terms: Chico's Gift Cards and eGift Cards may be redeemed at Chicos.com (U.S. orders only), Chico's U.S. boutiques and outlets, or by phone at 888.855.4986. The value of your purchase, plus any shipping, handling and applicable tax, is automatically deducted from your balance. Check remaining value online or by calling 888.855.4986. You may not add value back or redeem for cash, except as required by law. Cards do not expire and have no fees. Safeguard your card number and PIN; the bearer is responsible for loss, damage or theft.

e28fb177-9bb4-4728-ad66-1547c8cac4b7.intro: Bold Tex-Mex, sizzling fajitas and baby back ribs
e28fb177-9bb4-4728-ad66-1547c8cac4b7.description: Chili's Grill & Bar is a casual-dining restaurant famous for its sizzling fajitas, hand-battered Big Mouth Burgers, fall-off-the-bone baby back ribs, and the bottomless chips and salsa that start every meal. Margaritas and a lively bar round out the laid-back Tex-Mex experience.
e28fb177-9bb4-4728-ad66-1547c8cac4b7.instructions: Redeemable at Chili's Grill & Bar locations and at any Brinker venue accepting the Brinker gift card. Present the card to your server or at the register, or enter the card number and PIN when prompted at checkout. The full balance can be applied toward your meal, including food, drinks and tip.
e28fb177-9bb4-4728-ad66-1547c8cac4b7.terms: Redeemable for food or beverages at any Chili's Grill & Bar, On The Border Mexican Grill & Cantina or Maggiano's Little Italy restaurant in the U.S. Not redeemable for cash, except as required by law. Original activation receipt is required for replacement of lost or stolen gift cards. No service fees apply. Issued by Brinker Services Corporation. For balance inquiry or customer service, call 1-888-532-6092. For location information, visit brinker.com.

b05cbf2a-62f4-403c-a5aa-039bf02d330a.description: Chipotle offers a focused menu of burritos, tacos, burrito bowls and salads made from fresh, high-quality ingredients, prepared using classic cooking methods. Through its Food With Integrity vision, Chipotle seeks better food that is, where possible, sustainably grown and raised responsibly.
b05cbf2a-62f4-403c-a5aa-039bf02d330a.instructions: To redeem in store, print this page or pull it up on your smartphone and present it at the time of payment at any Chipotle restaurant. To redeem online, place an order at chipotle.com and use your eGift card at checkout. Keep your code private. Check your balance at any U.S. Chipotle, online at chipotle.com, or call 1-877-925-4878.
b05cbf2a-62f4-403c-a5aa-039bf02d330a.terms: Treat this card like cash; it may only be used for purchases at Chipotle restaurants. Not redeemable for cash except as required by law; on request, unredeemed balances under $10.00 will be redeemed for cash. Cannot be used to purchase other Chipotle gift cards. Possession of unactivated cards and unauthorized resale are prohibited; cards from a re-seller are used at your own risk. Chipotle is not responsible for unauthorized use and may decline to replace value if the card is lost, stolen or destroyed. Only redeemable in the USA. Check your balance at chipotle.com or call 1-877-925-4878.

275878ce-b03f-4d09-b8ba-d302222bd37c.description: Chiquito is a Tex-Mex and Mexican restaurant chain serving sizzling fajitas, burritos, enchiladas, nachos and other Latin-inspired dishes, complemented by a lively bar menu of margaritas and cocktails. It offers a vibrant, fiesta-style dining experience.
275878ce-b03f-4d09-b8ba-d302222bd37c.instructions: Redeem your Chiquito gift card by entering the card number and PIN, or showing the physical card, at checkout either in-store or when ordering online through the Big Table Group website (bigtablegroup.com). The value can be applied as full or partial payment at any participating Chiquito location and can be combined with other offers. Check the remaining balance at showmybalance.com by entering the same card details.
275878ce-b03f-4d09-b8ba-d302222bd37c.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

d9da1749-9758-4a1d-a51c-fc5e2c172ecf.intro: Bold short shorts and lifestyle apparel
d9da1749-9758-4a1d-a51c-fc5e2c172ecf.description: Chubbies is a men's lifestyle apparel brand best known for bringing short shorts back to men's fashion. With iconic styles and bold prints, Chubbies makes high-quality everyday apparel with a fun twist across swim, sport, lounge and casual wear.
d9da1749-9758-4a1d-a51c-fc5e2c172ecf.instructions: To redeem online, apply your gift card number to the cart at checkout at chubbiesshorts.com. To redeem in store, present your card at a Chubbies retail store for scan or keyed entry. The card will not expire. Check your balance at chubbies.giftcardassistance.com.
d9da1749-9758-4a1d-a51c-fc5e2c172ecf.terms: Purchase or use constitutes acceptance of the Gift Card Terms and Conditions at chubbies.giftcardassistance.com. Redeemable in the United States only for authorized goods at chubbiesshorts.com and at Chubbies retail stores. Not redeemable for cash or credit and will not be replaced or refunded except where required by law. For refund or customer service inquiries, contact chubbies@giftcardassistance.com. Issued and administered by TGCM SCOI - 2. Will not expire. Resale is strictly prohibited without consent of the issuer.

c199b4bb-5b2b-458e-a2f8-0cec5d351f17.intro: Where a kid can be a kid
c199b4bb-5b2b-458e-a2f8-0cec5d351f17.description: A Chuck E. Cheese eGift card gives the gift of fun, from epic birthday parties to everyday play. It covers everything kids love, including All You Can Play games, pizza, prizes and more, delivered by mail or instantly by email.
c199b4bb-5b2b-458e-a2f8-0cec5d351f17.instructions: To redeem, display the gift card number and associated PIN from your mobile device to the cashier at the time of purchase, or print the eGift card and present it. The cashier will hand-key the number and PIN into the POS. The card may be used at participating U.S. stores only, not online, and has no expiration date.
c199b4bb-5b2b-458e-a2f8-0cec5d351f17.terms: May be used to purchase food, merchandise or service at any participating U.S. Chuck E. Cheese store. May not be used for online purchases or redeemed for cash, unless required by law. Cannot be used toward Fun Pass (Monthly or 2-Month Memberships), in store or online. Any unused balance remains for future purchases except where prohibited by law. Has no expiration date and no service or reactivation fees. The balance may not be increased or reloaded. Not responsible for any lost or stolen card, or for cards purchased from anyone other than the issuer.

1fdddaa8-734e-4cb3-b637-06a92cdf88db.description: Cinemark gift cards are the perfect gift for any occasion. Redeem them online at Cinemark.com for movie tickets, or at any local theatre for the box office and concessions, and earn Cinemark Movie Rewards points with every visit.
1fdddaa8-734e-4cb3-b637-06a92cdf88db.instructions: Redeem your gift card online at cinemark.com or at any Cinemark theatre in the U.S.; visit cinemark.com for a list of locations. Online ticket purchases are charged a per-ticket fee, which is deducted from your balance. Check your balance at cinemark.com, by emailing giftcards@cinemark.com, or by calling 1-800-CINEMARK.
1fdddaa8-734e-4cb3-b637-06a92cdf88db.terms: Cinemark Gift Cards may be redeemed at the box office, concession stand or restaurant, kiosks, mobile app and online at cinemark.com. Online ticket purchases are charged a per-ticket fee, deducted from the card until the balance reaches zero. Not refundable or redeemable for cash, except as provided by law in CA, CO, CT, ME, MA, MT, NJ, OR, PR, RI, TX, VT and WA. Protect this card like cash. No expiration date or dormancy fees. Customer service: giftcards@cinemark.com or 1-800-CINEMARK. Cards remain Cinemark property and may be retained for improper use.

d326f40e-0e85-4ee5-946c-86e07e60eecb.description: Cineplex is one of Canada's leading entertainment companies, operating a modern, fully digitized theatre circuit alongside The Rec Room and Playdium. From blockbusters to dining and gaming, it offers entertainment for every occasion.
d326f40e-0e85-4ee5-946c-86e07e60eecb.instructions: At the cinema, show your gift card to the cashier and scan the QR code. Online, enter the code on your gift card at checkout. Note that e-cards cannot be used at self-serve kiosks. Check your balance at Cineplex.com or call 1-800-544-7573.
d326f40e-0e85-4ee5-946c-86e07e60eecb.terms: Issued by Cineplex Entertainment LP (Cineplex) and usable at locations owned or operated by Cineplex in Canada, including any theatre, The Rec Room and Playdium, as well as online where permitted. E-cards cannot be used at self-serve kiosks. To redeem, print the e-card or load it onto a mobile device. Not exchangeable for cash or other cards unless required by law. Treat this e-card as cash. Lost or stolen e-cards, or balances used without permission, will not be replaced. SCENE points are not issued on purchase. Balances available at Cineplex.com or 1-800-544-7573.

2e9a9f2e-6594-475c-b452-b8139e37bd9b.intro: A moviegoing experience like no other
2e9a9f2e-6594-475c-b452-b8139e37bd9b.description: Cineworld is a leading multiplex cinema chain with over 100 sites across the UK. From big-budget blockbusters to the best British indies, there's always something to thrill, chill or delight film fans of all ages.
2e9a9f2e-6594-475c-b452-b8139e37bd9b.instructions: Cineworld eGift Vouchers can only be redeemed online as full or part payment for cinema tickets or an Unlimited card. Visit cineworld.co.uk, select your cinema, performance or product, and on the payment page choose Pay with Cineworld Gift Card or eGift Voucher. Enter the voucher code and 4-digit PIN to complete your purchase. Your voucher is valid for 12 months from purchase.
2e9a9f2e-6594-475c-b452-b8139e37bd9b.terms: Cineworld eGift Vouchers can only be redeemed online as full or part payment for cinema tickets and/or an Unlimited card. Further terms and conditions apply; visit cineworld.co.uk/giftcards and cineworld.co.uk/terms for details. Full terms and conditions at cineworld.co.uk/static/en/uk/terms/gift-cards-and-e-gift-cards.

192699ad-5901-49e0-bb73-3777c5793d51.description: Cinnabon is a bakery chain famous for its oversized, freshly baked cinnamon rolls topped with signature cream cheese frosting. The menu also features Caramel Pecanbons, bites, churros, and frozen and hot beverages.
192699ad-5901-49e0-bb73-3777c5793d51.instructions: Redeemable at Cinnabon locations. Present the card in-store, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout when ordering online. The card can also be used at any participating venue accepting the FOCUS Brands Mix It Up gift card.
192699ad-5901-49e0-bb73-3777c5793d51.terms: Usable up to the balance to purchase goods at participating Auntie Anne's, Carvel, Cinnabon, Jamba, McAlister's Deli, Moe's Southwest Grill and Schlotzsky's locations in the U.S. Not refundable or redeemable in cash except as required by law and may not be resold without permission. Not a debit or credit card. Will not be replaced or replenished if lost, stolen or used without authorization. Focus Brands Rewards, Inc. (FBRI) is the issuer and sole obligor and may assign that obligation to an assignee. For balance inquiry, visit giftcardmix.com.

eae561d5-1e00-4c7a-9be3-21fcef70ec23.description: The City Market gift card is your gateway to convenient shopping, where quality meets affordability. Use it for fresh groceries, household essentials and delightful treats, in store or online, with no expiration date.
eae561d5-1e00-4c7a-9be3-21fcef70ec23.instructions: To redeem online, shop at the City Market website, add items to your cart and proceed to checkout, then enter your gift card number and PIN to apply the balance. To redeem in store, present the card at any participating City Market location. Check your balance at gcbalance.com, by calling 1-866-822-6252, or in the Kroger Family of Companies app.
eae561d5-1e00-4c7a-9be3-21fcef70ec23.terms: Protect this card and treat it as you would cash. The card represents a prepayment for goods and fuel at The Kroger Family of Companies; for where it is redeemable, visit kroger.com/giftcardterms. Cannot be used for lottery, money orders, stored value or prepaid cards, gift cards, or products prohibited by law. Not exchangeable for cash except where required by law. Funds do not expire and there are no fees. If lost, stolen, damaged or destroyed, it will not be replaced and the value is lost. Issued by The Kroger Co. Check your balance at gcbalance.com or call 1-866-822-6252.

8923bb30-d8b8-4260-a099-2c2266708677.intro: Hearty American fare and legendary pies
8923bb30-d8b8-4260-a099-2c2266708677.description: Claim Jumper is a casual American restaurant famous for oversized, generously portioned plates of comfort food, slow-roasted meats and ribs. It's especially known for its towering, indulgent desserts and pies served in a rustic, lodge-style setting.
8923bb30-d8b8-4260-a099-2c2266708677.instructions: Redeemable at Claim Jumper locations and at any Landry's venue that accepts the Landry's gift card. Present the card in-store to your server or the host, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout. The balance applies to food and beverages on your bill.
8923bb30-d8b8-4260-a099-2c2266708677.terms: May be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's Inc. location in the U.S., excluding Houlihan's restaurants and GO RIO Cruises. Not valid in combination with any other discounts, promotional cards, coupons, online offers or special pricing, and cannot be redeemed with any contracted banquet or private dining event. Not valid toward the purchase of another gift card. No cash value; except as required by law, not redeemable for cash. Resale is strictly prohibited. For balance inquiries, call 1-888-345-8380 or visit LandrysInc.com.

f0f8ea53-12b3-41df-bb6b-19b79ff9a716.description: Clarks fuses the innovative vision of its designers with almost 200 years of expert craftsmanship to make contemporary, stylish shoes for the modern world. Its shoes symbolise an innovative, pioneering spirit, delivering tomorrow's shoes today.
f0f8ea53-12b3-41df-bb6b-19b79ff9a716.instructions: Redeem your Clarks Gift Card or e-Gift in store at any standalone Clarks store or Outlet store in the UK and ROI for full or part payment, with the amount deducted from your balance. Gift cards cannot be used at Clarks wholesale stockists or online. Your card expires 24 months from last use. No cash change is given.
f0f8ea53-12b3-41df-bb6b-19b79ff9a716.terms: Clarks Gift Cards and e-Gifts may only be used in standalone Clarks stores or Outlet stores within the UK and ROI; not at Clarks wholesale stockists or online. Expires 24 months from last use (a purchase, top-up or part redemption), after which any balance is cancelled. Once activated, redeemable for full or part payment, with the amount deducted from the balance. Cannot be returned, refunded or exchanged for cash except per your legal rights. Cannot be resold or transferred for value. No cash change given. Treat as cash; Clarks is not responsible for lost, damaged or stolen cards.

55e3d68d-b54c-491f-b061-cb12de944b66.intro: Protect clean water in your community
55e3d68d-b54c-491f-b061-cb12de944b66.description: Clean Water Fund develops grassroots environmental leadership and brings diverse communities together to improve their lives, focusing on health, consumer, environmental and community problems. Based in Washington, DC, it runs locally staffed environmental and health protection programs in more than 15 states.
55e3d68d-b54c-491f-b061-cb12de944b66.instructions: Redeem your donation card online at charityontop.org. Select REDEEM, enter your card number, then search for Clean Water Fund under organization name to direct your contribution.
55e3d68d-b54c-491f-b061-cb12de944b66.terms: Issued by Charity On Top Foundation, Inc., a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt charity (#81-1198370) registered in California, USA. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law; retain this receipt for your tax records. 85% of the card's value is redeemable as a contribution to a qualified registered third-party 501(c)(3) charity at charityontop.org/redeem.php. Not refundable or redeemable for cash or credit and cannot be replaced if deleted, lost or stolen. Does not expire and is not for resale. Full terms at charityontop.org/terms.php. Questions? Call 800-JOY-1029.

e3d16c77-740e-4fbb-baf5-7c8db7862bc5.description: Clinkerdagger is a classic American restaurant known for its waterfront setting, hand-cut steaks, fresh seafood and prime rib, alongside signature dishes and house desserts. It offers a refined yet warm dining experience with scenic views.
e3d16c77-740e-4fbb-baf5-7c8db7862bc5.instructions: Redeem in store at any participating Landry's, Inc. location, including Clinkerdagger: simply print this page and present it at the time of payment. Visit landrysinc.com to find your nearest location. For balance inquiry or to report a lost or stolen card, call 1-888-345-8380.
e3d16c77-740e-4fbb-baf5-7c8db7862bc5.terms: Issued by MOCGC, Corp. and may be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's, Inc. or affiliated location in the U.S. until the full balance is used. The card has no cash value; except as required by law, it is not redeemable for cash. Resale is strictly prohibited. For balance information or to report your card lost or stolen, call 1-888-345-8380. For terms and conditions, visit landrysinc.com/giftcards/terms.asp.

3b7665ea-0fb2-439a-a6fe-67788d67ff95.intro: Custom ice cream on a frozen stone
3b7665ea-0fb2-439a-a6fe-67788d67ff95.description: For more than 20 years, Cold Stone Creamery has served the finest ice cream, cakes, smoothies and shakes, using only the highest-quality ingredients and its signature process of preparing your custom creation on a frozen granite stone. It's as much about making people happy as it is about ice cream.
3b7665ea-0fb2-439a-a6fe-67788d67ff95.instructions: Redeem this card online or in store. At a Cold Stone Creamery location, present the gift card to a crew member, who will key the 16-digit number into the terminal to apply the balance to your order. Any remaining balance stays on the card for a future purchase. Check your balance at a store or at coldstonecreamery.com.
3b7665ea-0fb2-439a-a6fe-67788d67ff95.terms: Kahala Management, LLC is the issuer and sole holder of liability for this card. Once activated, treat the card like cash. Valid only at participating U.S. Cold Stone Creamery stores for in-store and possibly some online purchases. Not refundable or redeemable for cash, except where required by law. No expiration date or fees charged by the issuer. Complete terms and conditions are available on the website. For balance inquiry, visit a participating Cold Stone Creamery store or coldstonecreamery.com.

77bd0fa6-4642-4fdf-a287-e9bd14a5119f.description: Columbia has been creating innovative apparel, footwear, accessories and equipment for outdoor enthusiasts since 1938. Channeling a passion for the outdoors, Columbia builds performance products and technologies that keep people warm, dry, cool and protected year-round.
77bd0fa6-4642-4fdf-a287-e9bd14a5119f.instructions: Redeem your eGift card online at columbiasportswear.ca, mountainhardwear.ca or sorelfootwear.ca, or in store for merchandise at Columbia Sportswear owned retail and outlet stores in Canada, as well as Mountain Hardwear and SOREL retail stores. Check your balance at columbiasportswear.ca or call 866-682-9879.
77bd0fa6-4642-4fdf-a287-e9bd14a5119f.terms: Redeemable for merchandise only at Columbia Sportswear owned retail and outlet stores in Canada (excluding Quebec) and at columbiasportswear.ca. Non-refundable, does not expire, and has no fees. Not redeemable for cash, except where required by law. Columbia and its affiliates are not responsible for, and will not replace, lost, stolen or damaged cards. Columbia may refuse, cancel or hold cards and orders to investigate fraud and to correct balance or system errors. For balance enquiries, terms and store locations, visit columbiasportswear.ca or call 866-682-9879.

22e05572-9a0d-4844-a62b-e2719afb5aef.intro: Gear up for every outdoor adventure
22e05572-9a0d-4844-a62b-e2719afb5aef.description: Columbia Sportswear has outfitted outdoor enthusiasts with innovative apparel, footwear and equipment since 1938. From warm jackets to weatherproof boots, give the gift of staying warm, dry, cool and protected year-round.
22e05572-9a0d-4844-a62b-e2719afb5aef.instructions: Redeem online at columbia.com or at any Columbia Sportswear retail or outlet store in the US. Online, enter your card number at checkout; in store, present the printed card or barcode to the cashier. For balance inquiries call 866-682-9879.
22e05572-9a0d-4844-a62b-e2719afb5aef.terms: Redeemable for merchandise at Columbia Sportswear retail and outlet stores in the US or online at Columbia.com. Non-refundable, does not expire, and has no fees. May not be redeemed at third-party retailers, outside the US, transferred for value, or redeemed for cash except where required by law. Columbia is not responsible for and will not replace lost, stolen or damaged cards. For balance and store locations visit columbia.com or call 866-682-9879. Issued by Columbia Sportswear Brands USA, LLC, Portland, Oregon.

5a8f96bc-a824-4721-b41e-7b9d242afae9.description: Conoco, a Phillips 66 brand, fuels road trips, errands and everything in between. Keep the tank full for life's journeys, big and small.

99342e2b-f2fa-473e-b160-4e0bb6ee68c5.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

3e64a2f0-2553-4829-b46e-d7dab5577b87.instructions: Redeem online at finishline.com by entering your 16-digit gift card number and PIN on the payment page at checkout; up to three eGift cards may be used per order. To redeem in store, present the physical gift card or eGift card at the register. Any remaining balance stays on the card for future purchases.
3e64a2f0-2553-4829-b46e-d7dab5577b87.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

475bac58-8fd0-4869-96a6-ff8fba4d4040.intro: Online courses to master new skills
475bac58-8fd0-4869-96a6-ff8fba4d4040.description: Alpha Academy is an online learning platform with over 2,000 courses and a community of more than 500,000 learners. Dive into subjects like Beginner's Spanish, Digital Marketing, Fire Safety Training and Time Management, whether you're building on existing abilities or learning something new.
475bac58-8fd0-4869-96a6-ff8fba4d4040.instructions: Redeem online at alphaacademy.org/redeem-voucher/. Fill in the boxes with your information, enter the unique voucher code you received, wait until your course name appears, then click Submit to start learning. Redeem within 60 days of purchase, as the voucher code expires after that.
475bac58-8fd0-4869-96a6-ff8fba4d4040.terms: Enrolment includes unlimited access to the course. The same course cannot be redeemed twice by the same account. A free PDF certificate is available after finishing the course; contact customer support to claim it. A hard copy certificate is not free and carries a separate cost. The voucher code expires within 60 days of purchase, so please redeem the course before then.

52344bc5-8ffe-4efb-be2a-f39007715c11.intro: Casual Gulf Coast seafood by the water
52344bc5-8ffe-4efb-be2a-f39007715c11.description: Fish Tales is a casual waterfront seafood restaurant on Galveston Island serving fresh Gulf catch, fried baskets, po'boys and cold drinks. Its breezy, beach-town atmosphere makes it a relaxed spot for seafood with a view.
52344bc5-8ffe-4efb-be2a-f39007715c11.instructions: Redeemable at Fish Tales and at any Landry's venue that accepts the Landry's gift card. Present the card in-store to your server or the host, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout. The balance applies to food and beverages on your bill.
52344bc5-8ffe-4efb-be2a-f39007715c11.terms: This card may be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's, Inc. location in the United States, excluding Houlihan's restaurants and GO RIO Cruises. Not valid in combination with other discounts, promotional cards, coupons, online offers or special pricing, and cannot be redeemed with any contracted banquet or private dining event. Not valid toward the purchase of another gift card. The card has no cash value and, except as required by law, is not redeemable for cash. Any resale is strictly prohibited. For balance inquiries call 1-888-345-8380 or visit LandrysInc.com.

92babda8-5693-412c-9a4e-3f94a3199e67.description: Fisherman's Wharf is a Galveston waterfront restaurant serving fresh Gulf seafood, from shrimp and oysters to whole fish, with views of the harbor and passing ships. Its relaxed dockside setting makes it a classic destination for seafood by the sea.
92babda8-5693-412c-9a4e-3f94a3199e67.instructions: Redeemable at Fisherman's Wharf and at any Landry's restaurant or venue that accepts the Landry's gift card. Present the card to your server or host in-store, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout when paying online. The balance is applied toward food and beverages on your bill.
92babda8-5693-412c-9a4e-3f94a3199e67.terms: This card may be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's, Inc. location in the United States, excluding Houlihan's restaurants and GO RIO Cruises. Not valid in combination with other discounts, promotional cards, coupons, online offers or special pricing, and cannot be redeemed with any contracted banquet or private dining event. Not valid toward the purchase of another gift card. The card has no cash value and, except as required by law, is not redeemable for cash. Any resale is strictly prohibited. For balance inquiries call 1-888-345-8380 or visit LandrysInc.com.

595bdaa7-1f07-4f34-9c58-749197daa46f.description: Five Guys serves burgers and fries the way they're meant to be: fresh, never-frozen beef patties, 15+ free toppings for over 250,000 combinations, generous hand-cut fries and irresistible hand-spun milkshakes. Treat someone to a properly satisfying meal.
595bdaa7-1f07-4f34-9c58-749197daa46f.instructions: Redeem at participating Five Guys restaurants in the UK. Present your gift card or code when you pay to apply the value to your order. Full redemption details and terms are available at fiveguys.co.uk/gift-card-terms-conditions/.
595bdaa7-1f07-4f34-9c58-749197daa46f.terms: Full terms and conditions are available at fiveguys.co.uk/gift-card-terms-conditions/.

cbd00187-ccbe-4d34-b999-1196fc384983.intro: More than you expected, from scratch
cbd00187-ccbe-4d34-b999-1196fc384983.description: Five Guys is a family-run burgers and fries joint that exists to give you a real place to enjoy craveable, from-scratch food, always making sure you get more than you expected.
cbd00187-ccbe-4d34-b999-1196fc384983.instructions: Redeem online at order.fiveguys.com or in store. Online, add items to your bag, select Checkout, click Gift Card under Payment Method, then enter the full 19-digit gift card number and four-digit PIN and click Add Card; funds apply automatically, with any remaining balance paid by another method. In store, present a printed copy of the eGift Card with PIN or display the eGift Card number when you pay.
cbd00187-ccbe-4d34-b999-1196fc384983.terms: Your use of this card constitutes acceptance of these terms. The Five Guys eGift Card may be used, up to its balance, to purchase food or drinks at participating Five Guys restaurants. Not redeemable for cash except where and as required by law, and not reloadable. Please safeguard your eGift Card number; the bearer is responsible for its loss or theft. It cannot be replaced or replenished if lost, stolen, or used without authorisation, except as required by law.

172123cd-c42f-4f04-b7a3-4f8a1907685f.intro: Pub food and drink at 750+ venues
172123cd-c42f-4f04-b7a3-4f8a1907685f.description: Flaming Grill, powered by the Great British Pub Card, is a digital gift code redeemable against food and drink at over 750 pubs nationwide, including Chef & Brewer, Hungry Horse, Farmhouse Inns, Belhaven and Loch Fyne. It's perfect for families, couples or a night out with mates.
172123cd-c42f-4f04-b7a3-4f8a1907685f.instructions: Redeem in store at any participating Great British Pub Card venue. Use the card as a payment method when you order at the till; if your order is more than the balance, pay the difference with cash or card, and if it's less, the value is deducted and the remaining balance carries over to a new code for future visits. Find venues and check your balance at greatbritishpubcard.co.uk/gift-card/. Valid for 1 year from last use.
172123cd-c42f-4f04-b7a3-4f8a1907685f.terms: For balance enquiries, full terms and participating pubs visit greatbritishpubcard.co.uk/gift-card/, or call 08435 064 006 (Mon-Fri, 09:00-17:00). Issued by Spirit Pub Company Plc, trading as Great British Pub Card; use constitutes acceptance. References to the card include SMS and email cards. Under the Distance Selling Regulations you may cancel cards bought by phone, online, email or SMS for a full refund within 7 working days of delivery via greatbritishpubcard.co.uk/contactus, returning the card. Once activated, the value can be used as full or part payment at any participating pub.

5221e8db-f7bb-49cd-8aab-6bb87a11926d.intro: Luxury fashion and beauty for everyone
5221e8db-f7bb-49cd-8aab-6bb87a11926d.description: FLANNELS is a super-inclusive, multi-category retailer bringing luxury to everyone. It stocks the biggest names in luxury fashion and beauty alongside an evolving roster of new and emerging labels, reviving the in-store experience across key UK cities.
5221e8db-f7bb-49cd-8aab-6bb87a11926d.instructions: Redeem in store or online at flannels.com. Choose Gift Card as your payment method, then enter or present your card details to apply the value to your order. The card is valid for 24 months from purchase and can only be used within the United Kingdom.
5221e8db-f7bb-49cd-8aab-6bb87a11926d.terms: No postage cost. Redeemable in store or online, available up to 100 GBP. Valid for 24 months from the date of purchase, after which any remaining balance is cancelled. Cannot be used outside the United Kingdom. Treat gift cards as cash; we accept no liability for lost, stolen or damaged cards. If a purchase part-paid by gift card is refunded, the card is refunded up to its original value first, with any remainder via the original payment method; if you no longer have the card, a new one is issued up to the original value. Gift cards cannot be used to buy further gift cards.

7bf8b352-9ac0-4a5e-8936-cec0fd0760a2.intro: Prime steaks and an acclaimed wine bar
7bf8b352-9ac0-4a5e-8936-cec0fd0760a2.description: Fleming's Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar serves prime, aged steaks and fresh seafood alongside an award-winning wine list featuring 100 wines by the glass. The contemporary, upscale setting is built for celebrations and refined evenings out.
7bf8b352-9ac0-4a5e-8936-cec0fd0760a2.instructions: Redeemable at Fleming's Prime Steakhouse locations and at any participating venue that accepts the Bloomin' Brands gift card. Present the physical card to your server or at the bar, or provide the card number and PIN when settling your check. The card applies to food, beverages and gratuity where permitted.
7bf8b352-9ac0-4a5e-8936-cec0fd0760a2.terms: Use of the card equals acceptance of these terms. Redeemable at any Bloomin' Brands restaurant in the United States, including Outback Puerto Rico and Guam locations. The card has no replacement value if lost or stolen. No returns, and not redeemable for gift cards or cash except where required by law. Treat this card as cash. For locations and balance information visit bloominbrands.com.

191a0269-0e7a-4356-97c3-355685815e30.intro: Shop online without a credit card
191a0269-0e7a-4356-97c3-355685815e30.description: Flexepin is a prepaid cash voucher that lets you top up accounts and shop online without a credit or debit card. Because no personal or financial information is requested or saved, it helps reduce the threat of online fraud, and it's accepted on thousands of websites.
191a0269-0e7a-4356-97c3-355685815e30.instructions: Redeem online at a partner website that accepts Flexepin. Check the site accepts Flexepin, then at payment enter your 16-digit code to complete the transaction. Confirm participating sites at flexepin.com.
191a0269-0e7a-4356-97c3-355685815e30.terms: Full terms and conditions are available at flexepin.com/terms/.

2f992af0-c574-4469-b1e1-d32eb6e1b650.description: FlystayGift offers a world-class flight plus hotel package gift card and online travel booking selection, with a choice of 450 airlines and over 750,000 hotels, villas and apartments. Book with trusted travel brands including Delta, American Airlines, British Airways, Emirates, Air Canada, Marriott, Hilton, Hyatt and many more.
2f992af0-c574-4469-b1e1-d32eb6e1b650.instructions: Redeem online only at tripgift.com. Register an account, search and book your flight or hotel, then enter the traveller details and paste your eGift card code into the redeem box at checkout. You can use up to two eGift codes per transaction, paying any difference by Visa, MasterCard or American Express. North American residents' cards do not expire.
2f992af0-c574-4469-b1e1-d32eb6e1b650.terms: A maximum of two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value, pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. Cards expire 12 months from issuance, except for North American residents, whose cards do not expire; Ireland is 60 months, Australia and Germany 36 months, subject to local law and any required residual refund value. All website content, service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms are at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx.

5017c5bd-4d5f-434a-953b-5743897d3afd.description: FlystayGift offers a world-class dynamic flight plus hotel package gift card and online travel booking selection, with a choice of 450 airlines and over 800,000 hotels, villas and apartments. Access trusted brands including American Airlines, British Airways, Emirates, Singapore Airlines, Marriott, Hilton, Accor and IHG.
5017c5bd-4d5f-434a-953b-5743897d3afd.instructions: Redeem online only at flystaygift.com. Register an account, then click Book Trip / Redeem and search and book based on your needs. Enter the details for everyone in the booking, then at checkout paste your eGift card code into the Redeem eGift card code box, agree to the terms and click Order now. You can use up to two eGift codes per transaction. Valid for 12 months from activation or last use.
5017c5bd-4d5f-434a-953b-5743897d3afd.terms: A maximum of two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value, pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. Cards expire 12 months from issuance, except for North American residents, whose cards do not expire; Ireland is 60 months, Australia and Germany 36 months, subject to local law and any required residual refund value. All website content, service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms are at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx.

22e0c048-c3bf-42b9-9182-0bcd516f53dd.description: FlystayGift offers a world-class flight plus hotel package gift card and online travel booking selection, with a choice of 450 airlines and over 750,000 hotels, villas and apartments. Book with trusted travel brands including Delta, American Airlines, British Airways, Emirates, Air Canada, Marriott, Hilton, Hyatt and many more.
22e0c048-c3bf-42b9-9182-0bcd516f53dd.instructions: Go to the FlystayGift website, log in or create an account, and search for the flight or hotel you want to book. At checkout, locate the "Redeem eGift card code" field, enter the 16-digit code or PIN from your card, and submit; the card's balance is deducted from the total. Pay any remaining amount if the booking exceeds the card's value. Redemption is done online at flystaygift.com.
22e0c048-c3bf-42b9-9182-0bcd516f53dd.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

1b182de1-ac52-4c39-b7b9-9ed94d26f35d.description: Fogo de Chao is an internationally renowned steakhouse founded over 40 years ago in Southern Brazil. The menu features fire-roasted meats carved tableside by gaucho chefs, seasonal salads and sides, signature cocktails and an award-winning wine list, with seafood options and distinctive private dining available.
1b182de1-ac52-4c39-b7b9-9ed94d26f35d.instructions: Redeem at any Fogo de Chao location in the US or Puerto Rico for food or beverage. Present the card at the time of payment; it has no value until activated by the cashier. Check your balance at fogodechao.com or call 972-960-9533 with any questions.
1b182de1-ac52-4c39-b7b9-9ed94d26f35d.terms: Fogo de Chao Gift Cards may be used for goods and services at any Fogo de Chao in the US until the full balance is used, governed by the laws of Texas. Cards may be bought with a valid Visa, MasterCard, Discover or American Express card, or PayPal. You may not return or cancel a card after purchase; ownership and risk of loss pass to the purchaser when confirmation is sent. Lost, stolen or damaged cards are replaced only with the original receipt or card. Cards cannot be reloaded, resold, transferred for value, redeemed for cash or used to buy other gift cards, except where required by law.

393c208b-733d-4260-93f3-9a9a1609d724.intro: Grocery savings whenever you need them
393c208b-733d-4260-93f3-9a9a1609d724.description: The Food 4 Less gift card makes grocery shopping convenient for individuals and families alike. Use it for fresh produce, meats, dairy and more at your local Food 4 Less store, with no expiration date so you can shop on your own schedule.
393c208b-733d-4260-93f3-9a9a1609d724.instructions: Redeem in store at any Food 4 Less location in the United States. Choose your groceries, head to the cashier and present your gift card at checkout to deduct the amount from your total. Note that the card cannot be used for online purchases or to pay for subscriptions. Check your balance at gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use the Kroger Family of Companies mobile app.
393c208b-733d-4260-93f3-9a9a1609d724.terms: Protect this card and treat it as cash. For balance, check your sales receipt, visit gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use your Kroger Family of Companies app. Use constitutes acceptance. The card is a prepayment for goods and fuel at the Kroger Family of Companies (see kroger.com/giftcardterms). It cannot be used for lottery, money orders, prepaid or gift cards, or products prohibited by law, and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Funds do not expire and there are no fees. Lost, stolen or damaged cards will not be replaced. Issued by The Kroger Co.

30f89c60-fa07-4a97-b60b-1b80f81fb629.intro: Sneakers and sportswear from top brands
30f89c60-fa07-4a97-b60b-1b80f81fb629.description: Foot Locker UK is a leading retailer of athletic footwear and apparel, stocking the latest sneakers and sportswear from Nike, Jordan, adidas and more. Give the recipient the freedom to choose their next favourite pair.
30f89c60-fa07-4a97-b60b-1b80f81fb629.instructions: Use your Foot Locker gift card online (including footlocker.co.uk) and in-store. Online, add items to your cart, proceed to checkout, choose "Gift Card" as the payment method, then enter the 16-digit card number and PIN and click "Apply." In-store, present the physical card or its barcode to the cashier to scan or enter the number (and PIN if requested) and apply the balance.
30f89c60-fa07-4a97-b60b-1b80f81fb629.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

475b7810-7d58-4f9b-a1b2-5fcc67ae59aa.intro: If it's at Foot Locker, it's Approved
475b7810-7d58-4f9b-a1b2-5fcc67ae59aa.description: A Foot Locker gift card is the perfect gift, unlocking the best selection of Approved product from Nike, Jordan, adidas, Under Armour and more, both online and across 1,200 stores.
475b7810-7d58-4f9b-a1b2-5fcc67ae59aa.instructions: Redeem in store or online at footlocker.com. In store, present your gift card so the associate can scan the barcode or enter the 16-digit number, or display the barcode, card number and PIN from a mobile device. Online, enter the 16-digit number and PIN at checkout. Check your balance or read full terms at footlocker.com/giftcards or call 1-877-254-3333.
475b7810-7d58-4f9b-a1b2-5fcc67ae59aa.terms: Protect this card like cash; it has no fees and does not expire. The card may be applied toward in-store or online purchases at Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker and Champs Sports in the US. It may not be exchanged for cash except where legally required, and may not be used to purchase another gift card. It will not be replaced if lost or stolen. For card balance and full terms call 1-877-254-3333 (toll free) or visit footlocker.com/giftcards. Issued by Foot Locker Card Services LLC.

0847bfd9-7a1f-4b6d-8c29-882d2ddea1dc.description: Established in 2005, Footasylum is one of the leading retailers of fashion streetwear and sportswear. Always on the lookout for new and upcoming brands, it keeps its finger on the pulse of the street and sports fashion scene.
0847bfd9-7a1f-4b6d-8c29-882d2ddea1dc.instructions: Redeem online at footasylum.com. At checkout, choose Gift Card as your payment option and enter your card details to apply the value to your order. Note that only one gift card can be used per transaction.
0847bfd9-7a1f-4b6d-8c29-882d2ddea1dc.terms: Only one gift card can be used per single transaction. Cannot be used online as part of a Laybuy order. Full terms and conditions are available on the Footasylum website.

11d414ed-9931-4a4e-8ec1-a43aedaae8eb.intro: Designer fragrances at up to 70% off
11d414ed-9931-4a4e-8ec1-a43aedaae8eb.description: FragranceNet.com, trusted since 1997, is a leading online retailer carrying over 13,000 genuine brand-name fragrances, skincare, hair care, makeup, candles, aromatherapy and more, all at discounts up to 70% off department store prices. Free shipping is available on qualifying orders, along with gift wrapping and worldwide shipping.
11d414ed-9931-4a4e-8ec1-a43aedaae8eb.instructions: Redeem online only at fragrancenet.com. At checkout, enter your gift certificate number to apply it to your purchase. Check your current balance by logging in to your account at fragrancenet.com. For questions, contact FragranceNet.com or call 1-800-PARFUMS.
11d414ed-9931-4a4e-8ec1-a43aedaae8eb.terms: This gift card is not redeemable for cash and will not be replaced if lost or stolen. Redeemable for merchandise only online at FragranceNet.com. To obtain your current balance, log in to your user account at fragrancenet.com. Other conditions may apply. For questions, contact FragranceNet.com or call 1-800-PARFUMS.

2b72f9e3-39b2-41b6-ad49-519405d1ff4b.description: Frankie & Benny's, powered by the Restaurant Card, gives the choice and flexibility to dine at over 180 locations, including Bella Italia, Chiquito, Las Iguanas, The Banana Tree and Frankie & Benny's.
2b72f9e3-39b2-41b6-ad49-519405d1ff4b.instructions: Present the physical card, or the card number and PIN printed on the back, at any Frankie & Benny's outlet and tell the cashier you'd like to pay with a gift card; the staff enter the details into the POS and the balance is deducted, either in full or partially alongside cash or card. The same details can be entered when placing an online order through the Big Table Group website.
2b72f9e3-39b2-41b6-ad49-519405d1ff4b.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

d8a3b28b-4fce-44f1-807b-086c358e40c4.intro: One card across the Frasers Group
d8a3b28b-4fce-44f1-807b-086c358e40c4.description: This Frasers Group e-voucher is the gift that suits everyone, spendable in store and online across clothing, footwear and accessories. Use it at Sports Direct, Flannels, House of Fraser, GAME, USC, Jack Wills, scotts, Cruise, Evans Cycles and more.
d8a3b28b-4fce-44f1-807b-086c358e40c4.instructions: Redeem in store or online across Frasers Group brands, including Sports Direct, Flannels, House of Fraser, GAME, Studio, USC, Jack Wills, scotts, Cruise, Evans Cycles, Amara and I Saw It First. Present or enter your card details at the time of payment. The card is valid for 24 months from purchase and can only be used within the United Kingdom.
d8a3b28b-4fce-44f1-807b-086c358e40c4.terms: Redeemable in store or online at Frasers Group brands including Sports Direct, Flannels, House of Fraser, GAME, Studio, USC, Jack Wills, scotts, Cruise, Evans Cycles, Amara and I Saw It First. No postage cost, available up to 200 GBP. Valid for 24 months from purchase, after which any balance is cancelled. Cannot be used outside the UK. Treat gift cards as cash; we accept no liability for lost, stolen or damaged cards. If a part-paid purchase is refunded, the card is refunded up to its original value first, then any remainder via the original method. Gift cards cannot buy further gift cards.

4d11e737-bccf-4310-8422-7fedf4ff9aa8.description: The Fred Meyer gift card brings flexibility and choice to your shopping, good for groceries, household items and more across all Fred Meyer locations in the US. With no expiration date, it makes a practical gift recipients can use whenever they like.
4d11e737-bccf-4310-8422-7fedf4ff9aa8.instructions: Redeem in store or online at fredmeyer.com. In store, present your gift card at checkout; online, add items to your cart, select Gift Card as your payment method and enter your card number and PIN. Note that the card cannot be used to buy other gift cards or certain subscription services. Check your balance at gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use the Kroger Family of Companies mobile app.
4d11e737-bccf-4310-8422-7fedf4ff9aa8.terms: Protect this card and treat it as cash. For balance, check your sales receipt, visit gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use your Kroger Family of Companies app. Use constitutes acceptance. The card is a prepayment for goods and fuel at the Kroger Family of Companies (see kroger.com/giftcardterms). It cannot be used for lottery, money orders, prepaid or gift cards, or products prohibited by law, and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Funds do not expire and there are no fees. Lost, stolen or damaged cards will not be replaced. Issued by The Kroger Co.

a99626a7-4cbb-47b0-a8c1-42fe2b9252de.description: Give your friends and family the gift of good food with a FreshCo gift card. Usable at participating Sobeys-banner stores nationally, it makes a perfect present for the people you love.
a99626a7-4cbb-47b0-a8c1-42fe2b9252de.instructions: Redeem in store at FreshCo and other participating Sobeys banners across Canada, including Sobeys, IGA, Foodland, Safeway, Thrifty Foods, Lawtons Drugs and Needs. The declining-balance card can be used over several shopping trips until empty. Note it cannot buy other gift cards, and restrictions apply to liquor and fuel in certain provinces. Check your balance in store or by calling 1-800-832-0717.
a99626a7-4cbb-47b0-a8c1-42fe2b9252de.terms: Cards are valid at participating stores in Canada for all in-store purchases except another corporate gift card (grocery, fuel or liquor), third-party cards in Thrifty Foods and Needs, all banners in Quebec, or as prohibited by law. Cards have no expiry and no fees. Check your balance in store or by calling 1-800-832-0717. Protect your card like cash; the value cannot be replaced if lost, stolen, damaged or misused. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Redeemable at Sobeys, IGA, Foodland, Safeway, FreshCo, Thrifty Foods, Lawtons Drugs, Needs and Fast Fuel across Canada.

1ef44d28-3875-4981-a8bd-1ab583e472ce.description: Welcome to Fricker's, the home for fun, food, sports and spirits. Whether it's lunch, dinner or late night, Fricker's is the place to gather and enjoy.
1ef44d28-3875-4981-a8bd-1ab583e472ce.instructions: Redeem at any Fricker's location. Present the eGift at the time of purchase so staff can manually key in the card number printed on it. The card has no value until activated. For customer service, call 937-865-9242 or visit frickers.com.
1ef44d28-3875-4981-a8bd-1ab583e472ce.terms: Protect this card like cash; you may not be able to get a refund if it is lost or stolen. The card has no value until activated and may be used at participating merchant locations. Present it at the time of purchase. No cash redemption except in NJ (for balances under $5) and elsewhere as required by law. The merchant is not responsible for lost, stolen or damaged cards or for unauthorised use. For customer service, call 937-865-9242 or visit frickers.com.

0048a126-8af3-4f7c-93dc-9f262c55176e.intro: Fresh fruit arrangements for every occasion
0048a126-8af3-4f7c-93dc-9f262c55176e.description: FruitBouquets.com creates incredible carved fresh fruit arrangements that make the perfect gift for countless occasions. Succulent strawberries, ripe melons, juicy grapes, sweet pineapple and bright oranges are hand-selected and expertly designed into gift baskets and custom shapes. This card is also redeemable across the 1-800-Flowers.com family of brands.
0048a126-8af3-4f7c-93dc-9f262c55176e.instructions: Redeem online at fruitbouquets.com, 1800flowers.com, 1800baskets.com, cheryls.com, harryanddavid.com, berries.com and other 1-800-Flowers family sites, or by phone for participating brands. Print your digital card and enter the gift certificate number at checkout to apply it to your order. One gift card may be used per online order.
0048a126-8af3-4f7c-93dc-9f262c55176e.terms: The Gift Card and Gift Certificate is a prepaid payment device with a set dollar value. It is not a credit, charge or debit card, has no service fees and no expiration date. It can be used at the brands, stores, websites and phone orders listed at FreshGift.com. We may require credit card or alternate non-promotional payment information for verification, even if the card fully covers the order. You may not buy a gift card with another gift card, gift certificate, savings pass, award or rewards pass. One gift card per online order; for multiple, call the phone lines at freshgift.com.

c5f0724a-2969-450d-ba16-3f876d57f066.description: The Fry's gift card brings convenience and versatility to grocery shopping at all Fry's Food Stores across the US. With no expiration date, recipients can redeem it at their own pace for fresh produce, groceries, household items and more.
c5f0724a-2969-450d-ba16-3f876d57f066.instructions: Redeem in store at any Fry's Food Store or online at the Fry's website. In store, present your gift card at checkout; online, enter the card number and PIN at the payment step. Note that the card cannot be used for subscriptions or specific services. Check your balance at gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use the Kroger Family of Companies mobile app.
c5f0724a-2969-450d-ba16-3f876d57f066.terms: Protect this card and treat it as cash. For balance, check your sales receipt, visit gcbalance.com, call 1-866-822-6252, or use your Kroger Family of Companies app. Use constitutes acceptance. The card is a prepayment for goods and fuel at the Kroger Family of Companies (see kroger.com/giftcardterms). It cannot be used for lottery, money orders, prepaid or gift cards, or products prohibited by law, and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Funds do not expire and there are no fees. Lost, stolen or damaged cards will not be replaced. Issued by The Kroger Co.

7e3aae51-e066-4301-86e8-6be542837ddf.intro: A quarterly box of epic gadgets
7e3aae51-e066-4301-86e8-6be542837ddf.description: Gadget Discovery Club is a leading tech subscription box, featured in WIRED, The Independent, TechRadar and more. Each quarterly box delivers a themed mix of one to four gadgets worth 100 GBP+, reimagined with epic twists and built for maximum utility to upgrade part of your lifestyle.
7e3aae51-e066-4301-86e8-6be542837ddf.instructions: Redeem online at gadgetdiscoveryclub.com. Click Get Started, select whether it's for you or a gift, choose your country and plan (quarterly or annual), then enter your email and shipping info. Enter your gift card code in the Discount Code field at checkout, add payment info and submit. Valid for 24 months from issue.
7e3aae51-e066-4301-86e8-6be542837ddf.terms: The gift card balance cannot be exchanged for cash or used to buy another card, and cannot be combined with other offers. All gift cards have a redemption period of 24 months from the date of issue. If you choose a subscription or gift box priced higher than the card value, the difference is charged to your personal credit or debit card. Gift cards do not include shipping fees, which are charged separately. For 250 GBP or 500 GBP gift cards, contact support@gadgetdiscoveryclub.com for guidance on applying it to your plan.

50d020d7-0717-4da5-ab75-cb1f086c6f67.intro: Dining, retail and hospitality, all in one
50d020d7-0717-4da5-ab75-cb1f086c6f67.description: The Galveston Holiday Inn is a beachfront hotel on Galveston Island, Texas, offering comfortable guest rooms, on-site dining and easy access to the seawall and Gulf of Mexico. It's a convenient base for visitors looking to stay close to the beach and the island's attractions.
50d020d7-0717-4da5-ab75-cb1f086c6f67.instructions: Redeem in store at any participating Landry's location. Print this page and present it at the time of payment; find your nearest location at landrysinc.com. For a balance inquiry or to report your card lost or stolen, call 1-888-345-8380.
50d020d7-0717-4da5-ab75-cb1f086c6f67.terms: This card is issued by MOCGC, Corp. and may be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's, Inc. or affiliated location in the US until the full balance is used. For balance information or to report your card lost or stolen, call 1-888-345-8380. Full terms are at landrysinc.com/giftcards/terms.asp.

deea51fa-1ec2-4940-b19c-669be844ab69.description: Gambit Rewards lets you play games and complete activities to earn tokens you can redeem for real prizes and gift cards. This code adds 1,000 tokens to your account to fuel your next reward.

deea51fa-1ec2-4940-b19c-669be844ab69.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

Select "Redeem Code" and enter the number, and the 2,500 tokens are credited instantly to your balance. You can then spend tokens on the Gambit website, in the app, or at any participating retail partner that accepts Gambit tokens at checkout.
3c1279fe-6cd9-418e-bfb6-152f9390be8c.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

9b76ac42-aacd-485a-af11-5bb28023599f.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

0ea81d23-a29c-4b35-9a2e-31e5a7f1d2e4.description: Gambit turns the games you love into skill-based contests for real cash prizes. These 5,000 tokens load into your Gambit balance for plenty of tournament entries.
0ea81d23-a29c-4b35-9a2e-31e5a7f1d2e4.instructions: Visit gambitrewards.com and sign in or register with your Gambit account, then locate the "Redeem" or "Enter PIN" field and input the 12-digit PIN printed on the card. 0ea81d23-a29c-4b35-9a2e-31e5a7f1d2e4.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

8e6f4f94-f0dc-4629-939a-48dbc726eaba.description: GAME is the UK's leading games retailer, with deals on video games, consoles, accessories and the latest pre-orders. One card covers everything for the gamer in your life.
8e6f4f94-f0dc-4629-939a-48dbc726eaba.instructions: Redeem your GAME gift card online at game.co.uk or in store. Online, add the card number and PIN at the checkout payment step; in store, hand it to the cashier before paying. Any remaining balance stays on the card for next time. Valid for 24 months from purchase, and not usable outside the United Kingdom.
8e6f4f94-f0dc-4629-939a-48dbc726eaba.terms: Redeemable in store or online at game.co.uk, up to a maximum of £100. Cannot be used outside the United Kingdom. Treat gift cards as cash; GAME accepts no liability for lost, stolen or damaged cards. Valid for 24 months from the date of purchase, and any balance remaining after expiry will be cancelled. For partially gift-card-funded purchases, refunds go back to the gift card up to its original value first, then to the other payment method used. Gift cards cannot be used to buy further gift cards.

d940e7c4-4c1a-4a23-8afe-8264cbb8f168.description: GameStop is a global retailer of video games, consoles, pop-culture collectibles and consumer electronics, with thousands of stores worldwide plus GameStop.com. One card opens up the whole lineup.
d940e7c4-4c1a-4a23-8afe-8264cbb8f168.instructions: Shop online at GameStop.com and enter the card number and PIN at checkout just like a regular gift card, or redeem in store by showing the card number, PIN and barcode to the cashier from your phone or a printout. The cashier can scan the barcode or key in the details manually. Any remaining balance stays on the card. Check your balance at gamestop.com or by calling 1-888-818-2915.
d940e7c4-4c1a-4a23-8afe-8264cbb8f168.terms: Redeemable only for merchandise in the U.S. at GameStop, ThinkGeek, EB Games, Babbage’s and Planet X stores and online at GameStop.com. The card does not expire or impose fees. Except where required by law, it may not be returned, redeemed for cash or applied as payment on any account, and will not be replaced if lost or stolen. Not a credit or debit card and carries no warranties. Issued by Marketing Control Services, Inc. (Virginia), which may change these terms. Gift-card purchases do not count toward promotions or earn PowerUp Rewards points. For your balance, visit www.gamestop.com.

2bd8d0ce-08ad-46f4-8712-cd0da6547e47.description: Gander Outdoors is an outdoor retailer serving enthusiasts in local communities and online, with regionally and seasonally relevant gear at competitive prices. Stock up for hunting, fishing, camping and everything in between.
2bd8d0ce-08ad-46f4-8712-cd0da6547e47.instructions: Redeem in store by presenting the card at any Camping World, Gander Outdoors or Overton's location at checkout, or shop online and enter the gift card number and PIN at the payment step. 2bd8d0ce-08ad-46f4-8712-cd0da6547e47.terms: This card may be used to purchase goods or services at Camping World, Gander Outdoors or Overton's retail stores, or online at CampingWorld.com, Overtons.com and GanderOutdoors.com; it is not valid at Camping World RV Sales dealerships. The card may not be used as payment on any credit card account and can be used across multiple purchases until the balance reaches zero. Lost, stolen or damaged cards may be replaced only with proof of purchase, for the remaining balance. Void if altered or defaced. Card value is in US dollars. Issued by Camping World Card Services, Inc.

534ceb52-1ba9-4b04-a688-aa95da5b463e.intro: Historic Michigan dining in a former depot
534ceb52-1ba9-4b04-a688-aa95da5b463e.description: Gandy Dancer is an Ann Arbor seafood restaurant set in a beautifully restored historic railroad depot, serving fresh fish, shellfish and steaks in an atmospheric stone-walled setting. Its popular Sunday brunch and timeless menu make it a longstanding local favorite.
534ceb52-1ba9-4b04-a688-aa95da5b463e.instructions: Redeemable at Gandy Dancer and at any Landry's venue that accepts the Landry's gift card. Present the card in-store to your server or the host, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout. The balance applies to food and beverages on your bill.
534ceb52-1ba9-4b04-a688-aa95da5b463e.terms: This card may be used to purchase goods and services at any participating Landry's Inc. location in the United States, excluding Houlihan's restaurants and GO RIO Cruises. It is not valid in combination with other discounts, promotional cards, coupons, online offers or special pricing, and cannot be redeemed against a contracted banquet or private dining event. The card may not be used to buy another gift card. It has no cash value and, except as required by law, is not redeemable for cash. Resale is strictly prohibited. For balance inquiries, call 1-888-345-8380 or visit LandrysInc.com.

a9e3f06f-1378-415d-85e8-5240f613a278.intro: Effortless style for the whole family
a9e3f06f-1378-415d-85e8-5240f613a278.description: Gap has everything you need to express your personal style, from wardrobe essentials like tees, hoodies and great-fitting denim to trend-led tops and accessories for men, women, kids and baby. Shop the always-open gapcanada.ca.
a9e3f06f-1378-415d-85e8-5240f613a278.instructions: Redeem in store at any Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic or Athleta location, including outlet and factory stores, or shop online at gapcanada.ca and enter the card number and PIN at checkout. a9e3f06f-1378-415d-85e8-5240f613a278.terms: Issued by Direct Consumer Services ("DCS"). Redeemable for merchandise at any Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic or Athleta location, including outlet and factory stores, and online at gap.com, oldnavy.com, bananarepublic.com and athleta.com. Refunds are issued as a plastic gift card. Purchases are deducted until the balance reaches zero. May not be used with certain promotional offers or applied as payment on any account. Not redeemable for cash unless required by law. Restricted to the USA, Puerto Rico and Canada. Void if resold or transferred for value.

d93dfa35-7c65-4d9b-ba2d-f3054e87b8bd.description: The Gap Kids gift card gives young trendsetters the freedom to choose their own look, from casual everyday wear to standout accessories. A flexible, modern gift for birthdays, holidays or just because.

dda224a6-ec04-4983-a5b0-7678f30010d5.description: The Options card brings Gap, Old Navy and Banana Republic together on a single card, so you can grab jeans, a cashmere sweater and a graphic tee in one shopping trip. Redeemable in store and online across all three Canadian brands.

10cce4ee-47ae-47c6-beda-497d7edb42a2.terms: Redeemable in Canada only, with no fees or expiry date, toward the retail price of any product at a participating Harry Rosen location or online. Void if re-sold, transferred for value, or redeemed for cash. Unused eGift Cards may not be transferred for value. Cannot be used to purchase other eGifts or Gift Cards. Protect this card like you would cash.

11d07859-b9fd-49b3-9610-98aef13d5d4e.description: Harvester has been serving up famous grills, rotisserie chicken and its unbeatable unlimited salad bar since 1983. Carefully crafted dishes packed with authentic flavour make it the home of great family occasions.

11d07859-b9fd-49b3-9610-98aef13d5d4e.terms: This card may not be exchanged for cash and is not a cheque guarantee, credit, debit or change card. Treat text and email gift cards as cash; if deleted they will not be resent.

d43952ae-bd04-45ad-9409-fd6ecd7bfbb3.description: Harvey Nichols gift vouchers unlock a world of luxury — spend on designer fashion, beauty and homeware, or enjoy food and drink in the store restaurants. Accepted across all UK and Ireland stores plus London's OXO Tower Restaurant.

561369ee-94da-49d9-a4c6-b63f4665aa33.description: Harvey's is a Canadian fast-food chain famous for flame-grilled burgers topped to order at the counter, alongside crispy fries, onion rings, and poutine. It's a long-standing favorite for a customizable, freshly built burger.

561369ee-94da-49d9-a4c6-b63f4665aa33.terms: Redeemable in Canada only, with no fees or expiry date, at participating Harvey's locations and anywhere The Ultimate Dining Card is accepted (see ultimatediningcard.cashstar.com). 94ed1887-5005-4499-a166-9302204f6e35.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Valid for 18 months. Full terms and conditions at https://healthymindsclub.com/Website-Terms-and-Conditions

1a82ba87-b833-4c6c-bae5-7763fbcaa8a1.description: HelloFresh brings the joy back to home cooking. They plan, shop and deliver step-by-step recipes with pre-portioned fresh ingredients, so you can whip up flavourful, satisfying meals in around 30 minutes — no more wondering what's for dinner.

New customers can apply the $60 value toward any box type during sign-up; existing customers redeem it under Account Settings > Gifts and Discount Codes, where the credit is added to the next delivery. New customers are enrolled in an auto-renewal subscription on redemption and can pause or stop deliveries any time up to 5 days before the next scheduled delivery.
1a82ba87-b833-4c6c-bae5-7763fbcaa8a1.terms: Equivalent to $60 value. Valid for new and existing customers in the US only (excluding HI and AK). New customers apply the value toward any box at www.hellofresh.com; existing customers redeem under Account Settings > Gifts and Discount Codes, adding credit to the next delivery. New customers are enrolled in an auto-renewal subscription on redemption and can pause or stop deliveries any time 5 days before the next. One gift card per order; no combining with other promotions. Not valid for Wine, Kitchenware or Trial boxes. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced except as required by law.

57fb3320-476f-4bf0-9234-7e1e0068a110.description: Henry's Tavern is a gastropub known for one of the largest draft beer selections around, paired with an elevated menu of pub favorites, shareable plates and grilled specialties. For balance inquiries call 1-888-345-8380 or visit LandrysInc.com.

7d056e91-11a1-4bb8-a7e7-4b0ad80a6bd1.description: HighTales is an entertainment-led pub and dining brand from Greene King, combining a traditional pub menu of food and drink with experiential zones and a programme of events such as live music, comedy, games and pop-up cinema. It's designed as an all-day venue catering to a wide range of occasions.
7d056e91-11a1-4bb8-a7e7-4b0ad80a6bd1.instructions: Use your Hightales gift code in store at any participating pub. 7d056e91-11a1-4bb8-a7e7-4b0ad80a6bd1.terms: For balance enquiries, full terms and participating pubs visit greatbritishpubcard.co.uk/gift-card/. Under Distance Selling Regulations you may cancel cards bought by phone or online up to 7 working days after delivery for a full refund. Once activated, the value can be used as full or part payment in any participating pub.

f230b1ab-eff3-4b53-81d0-5f121b429b77.description: Hobbycraft celebrates the joy of making something by hand. From art materials, craft kits and paper craft to knitting, baking supplies, haberdashery and ready-to-make jewellery, there's something here for crafting lovers of all ages.

cb8594be-3791-45fa-98df-5f5eb7b40493.description: The Holland America gift card is your ticket to a memorable cruise, applicable toward any Holland America Line voyage. 12c399da-0ecf-40a5-99f1-f5fca1afdd93.description: Hooters serves up craveable food and ice-cold beer alongside wall-to-wall sports on big-screen TVs. With the signature Hooters Girls hospitality making everyone feel welcome, a Hooters gift card is the gift that keeps on giving.

31003b9b-ceaa-4814-8477-a6b722cdeb5e.terms: Travel must be booked with Inspire only, not the tour operator directly, via Inspire consultants or website. Check your balance at instacart.ca or call 888-246-7822. Issued by Maplebear Inc.

315544b1-304c-4927-a381-383967ed3972.description: With 76 locations across Atlantic Canada, Lawtons Drugs has offered the highest level of service and products for more than 100 years. Backed by parent company Sobeys Inc. and its core values.

dd3fee64-e9b0-4781-b8aa-065ac2f76e7a.terms: Redeemable at any Legal Sea Foods Restaurant Group location. Not valid for eCommerce or mail order. The card must be present for redemption. cae81d91-1f8d-4b1a-ba78-df9324aebe30.terms: By supporting, you agree to the full terms and conditions at oliverbonacini.com/terms-conditions.

df16f405-be15-42a9-933e-633b51969f0e.description: Lush invents, makes and sells fresh handmade cosmetics, from fizzing bath bombs to solid shampoo bars. A campaigning beauty company, Lush fights animal testing and over-packaging with a mission to leave the world Lusher than it found it.

01c3cf1b-ec4d-4ceb-a69c-8637290cde77.description: Maison Selby celebrates classic French cooking with a modern accent, serving favourites like tuna nicoise and coq au vin from breakfast through dinner. Set in a restored heritage mansion, it pairs an all-day menu with a standout cocktail program.

5b8d4f47-8029-4b2c-9048-fc6a314ae438.description: Miller & Carter Steakhouse treats carefully sourced 30-day aged British beef with the respect it deserves. Whatever your cut, from ribeye to chateaubriand, it's matched by an elegant cellar of wines available by the glass or bottle.

5b8d4f47-8029-4b2c-9048-fc6a314ae438.terms: May not be exchanged for cash and is not a cheque guarantee, credit, debit or charge card. SMS/email gift cards should be treated as cash and are not resent if deleted. Check balance at www.millerandcarter.co.uk/giftcards.

a3de2b7c-30c6-4709-952b-463773c52a41.intro: Casual sports bar, freshly made food
a3de2b7c-30c6-4709-952b-463773c52a41.description: Miller's Ale House is a casual sports restaurant and bar serving freshly made food at an incredible value. It's a place where making friends is as easy as ordering your next beer.

a3de2b7c-30c6-4709-952b-463773c52a41.terms: Usable for food, beverages and merchandise at any Miller's Ale House location or website.
