d74a1d21-4701-4a55-af92-5cfaccd667cd.instructions: Redeem Record Tokens online or in store at participating independent record stores across the UK; find details at recordtokens.co.uk. Choose from a huge range of vinyl and CDs and apply your token toward your purchase. Tokens remain valid for 8 years from last use. For full details, see recordtokens.co.uk/card-terms--conditions.
d74a1d21-4701-4a55-af92-5cfaccd667cd.terms: Valid for 8 years from last use. Redeemable online and in store at participating independent record stores across the UK. For full terms and conditions, visit recordtokens.co.uk/card-terms--conditions.

bbb71348-f61f-42ac-9a63-f2b6cfdd1e34.description: Red Letter Days pioneered the idea of giving unforgettable experiences as gifts back in 1989, and its iconic red box remains the go-to. From relaxing spa escapes to once-in-a-lifetime moments like a Spitfire flight, there is something for every taste, occasion and budget.
bbb71348-f61f-42ac-9a63-f2b6cfdd1e34.instructions: Redeem this e-gift card online at redletterdays.co.uk toward your choice of experience. Note that the card cannot be used alongside discount codes or to buy tangible gifts such as hampers, and products appear at full price when the card is redeemed. The card is valid for 12 months from purchase; for full terms, visit redletterdays.co.uk/terms.
bbb71348-f61f-42ac-9a63-f2b6cfdd1e34.terms: Your giftcard cannot be used to purchase tangible gifts such as hampers or in conjunction with discount codes. Valid for 12 months from purchase. For full terms and conditions, please visit redletterdays.co.uk/terms.

916c35fa-a15f-4e76-8f40-83febcff3224.description: The Red Lobster eGift Card is the perfect gift for the seafood lover, opening up world-famous lobster, scallop, shrimp and crab dishes plus popular sides and the legendary Cheddar Bay biscuits. From a single Florida restaurant in 1968, Red Lobster has grown into a seafood favourite with locations across Canada.
916c35fa-a15f-4e76-8f40-83febcff3224.instructions: This eGift Card is redeemable in person only at participating Red Lobster locations in Canada. Print it at home or display it on your smartphone, then show the card number and PIN to the cashier or server when paying your bill; your purchase is deducted from the balance until it reaches zero. Check your balance in person, online at redlobster.ca/gift-cards, or by calling 1-888-889-7349.
916c35fa-a15f-4e76-8f40-83febcff3224.terms: The Red Lobster eGift Card is only redeemable in Canada and has no fees or expiry date. It can be used in person at participating Canadian locations and is not valid for catering or third-party delivery. It will not be replaced if lost, stolen, or used without consent. It cannot be reloaded, re-sold, transferred for value, or redeemed for cash, except as required by law. You may not use it to buy other eGifts or Gift Cards. Protect this card like cash. Issued by RLSV, Inc. Check balance in person, at redlobster.ca/gift-cards, or by calling 1-888-889-7349.

57b7ae34-bd52-4611-884d-036da98aec3b.description: Red Lobster is the world's largest and most-loved seafood restaurant company, focused on serving high-quality, freshly prepared seafood that is traceable, sustainable and responsibly sourced. Join My Red Lobster Rewards for clawsome incentives.
57b7ae34-bd52-4611-884d-036da98aec3b.instructions: Present this eGift Card at participating Red Lobster restaurants in the US at the time of payment, where the server will manually key in the 16-digit card number to apply your balance. Each use deducts from the card until the balance is gone. For balance, activity, and full terms, visit redlobster.com or call 1-877-720-6601.
57b7ae34-bd52-4611-884d-036da98aec3b.terms: Your purchase, use, or acceptance of this eGift Card constitutes acceptance of these terms. Issued by and solely an obligation of RLSV, Inc. Each use deducts from the balance until fully used. Except where required by law, it is not redeemable for cash. The value cannot be replaced if lost or stolen. Redeemable only at participating Red Lobster restaurants in the US, and not for alcohol where prohibited by law. The eGift Card does not expire and its balance cannot be transferred to a physical gift card. For balance and complete terms, visit redlobster.com or call 1-877-720-6601.

a730296c-0928-4bb2-ac37-e4e63f623e8b.description: The Red Robin eGift Card serves up crave-able, high-quality gourmet burgers along with bottomless Steak Fries, sandwiches, brews and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. With over 50 years of history, Red Robin is a hit with diners of all ages.
a730296c-0928-4bb2-ac37-e4e63f623e8b.instructions: This eGift Card is redeemable in person only for food and beverages at participating Red Robin locations in Canada. Print it at home or display it on your smartphone, then show it to the server or cashier when paying your bill; each use deducts from the balance until it reaches zero. For full terms, visit redrobin.com/gift-cards.
a730296c-0928-4bb2-ac37-e4e63f623e8b.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Redeemable in person only at participating Red Robin locations in Canada for food and beverages. Each use is deducted from the balance until it reaches zero, with any excess payable by another method. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. For full terms of use, visit redrobin.com/gift-cards.

5b5e8550-36ec-48f9-84a7-82e3d0a74f40.description: Red Robin is a casual dining chain famous for more than two dozen craveable gourmet burgers served with Bottomless Steak Fries, plus salads, sandwiches, entrees and soups. It is a fun, welcoming spot for guests of all ages.
5b5e8550-36ec-48f9-84a7-82e3d0a74f40.instructions: To redeem online at redrobin.com, enter the card number when prompted for payment. To redeem in store, print your eGift Card, bring it to any Red Robin restaurant in the US, and present it at the time of payment to apply your balance. For balance inquiries or customer service, call 888-272-6528.
5b5e8550-36ec-48f9-84a7-82e3d0a74f40.terms: Use this gift card for anything on the menu at participating Red Robin locations until the balance runs out. Use constitutes acceptance of these terms. Hold this card securely; cards are only replaced up to the remaining balance with the card number and satisfactory proof of purchase. Not valid in Canada and where void by law. Not reloadable. Cannot be redeemed for cash, except as required by law, or used to purchase gift cards. No expiration date or fees. For balance or customer service, call 888-272-6528. Issued and managed by Red Robin Distributing Company, LLC.

444386a5-1f94-4adb-897c-9ee043cfddd4.intro: Relaxed wine tavern with elevated comfort food
444386a5-1f94-4adb-897c-9ee043cfddd4.description: Reds Wine Tavern is a stylish wine-focused restaurant offering an extensive wine list paired with elevated comfort dishes and seasonal plates. Its warm, relaxed setting makes it a fitting choice for both business lunches and evenings out.
444386a5-1f94-4adb-897c-9ee043cfddd4.instructions: Redeemable at Reds Wine Tavern locations. Present the card to your server in-store, or enter the card number and PIN at checkout when paying online. The card can also be used as part of the SIR Corp Inspired Dining Card at participating venues.
444386a5-1f94-4adb-897c-9ee043cfddd4.terms: Use of the card constitutes acceptance of these terms. Protect this card like cash. Redeemable at any Service Inspired Restaurants location. Present it to your server when paying your bill; remaining balance can be used toward your next bill. You can add value at any of the restaurants. Check your balance at any SIR Corp. location or online. Card is non-refundable, has no cash value, and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. If lost, stolen, or used without authorization, it cannot be replaced. Value is in Canadian dollars. Issued by SIR Corp. Visit sircorp.com.

1b725a06-7dde-4238-a133-4abda2e31f3f.intro: The best place to watch a movie
1b725a06-7dde-4238-a133-4abda2e31f3f.description: Regal operates the largest and most geographically diverse theatre circuit in the US. This gift card covers admission or concessions, making it the perfect gift for any movie fan.
1b725a06-7dde-4238-a133-4abda2e31f3f.instructions: Add this gift card to the Regal app to redeem for tickets, or print this page or show it on your mobile device and present it at the box office or concession counter at any Regal theatre (it is not redeemable at ticketing kiosks). The card is valid for in-store use and has no expiry. View participating theatres at REGmovies.com.
1b725a06-7dde-4238-a133-4abda2e31f3f.terms: Regal gift cards are redeemable for tickets or concession items at any Regal theatre, including Regal Cinemas, United Artists Theatres, and Edwards Theatres. No expiry. Visit corporateboxoffice.com/t-terms.aspx for full terms and conditions. Please treat this eGift card like cash and safeguard it accordingly. Disclaimer: Regal is not a sponsor of the rewards or otherwise affiliated with this company. The logos and identifying marks are trademarks owned by each represented company and/or its affiliates.

759ab9b0-ccf1-44b6-aa18-4300c54d52ac.intro: A sweet treat at the movies
759ab9b0-ccf1-44b6-aa18-4300c54d52ac.description: This Regal Candy Voucher covers your next trip to the concession stand with a candy item that never expires. It makes a great gift or reward, redeemable at all Regal locations.
759ab9b0-ccf1-44b6-aa18-4300c54d52ac.instructions: Print this entire voucher, or present the scannable QR code on your mobile device at the concession stand at any Regal theatre (regmovies.com). Hand it to the attendant to redeem for one candy item. Then enjoy the show.
759ab9b0-ccf1-44b6-aa18-4300c54d52ac.terms: Each voucher is redeemable for one Small, Regular, Medium, or Large Candy item at any Regal concession counter. Not valid for extra large size product. Not valid with any other offer. Vouchers will not be replaced if lost or stolen.

b2140d8d-7ef0-48f2-887c-a373448122cd.intro: A movie ticket that never expires
b2140d8d-7ef0-48f2-887c-a373448122cd.description: The Regal Premiere Ticket is perfect for gifts, rewards, incentives and perks, good for any standard 2D film. Redeem it at any Regal location nationwide, online, or on the Regal app.
b2140d8d-7ef0-48f2-887c-a373448122cd.instructions: Redeem in person at a self-service kiosk, concession stand, or guest service counter by providing showtime details and scanning the QR code (one per ticket), then select reserved seating if applicable. Or redeem online at regmovies.com or via the Regal App by signing in to your Regal Crown Club account and selecting your theatre, movie and showtime. Tickets never expire; surcharges apply to premium formats.
b2140d8d-7ef0-48f2-887c-a373448122cd.terms: Surcharges apply to all IMAX, RPX, ScreenX, Premium Large Format, 3D, and 4DX films, and luxury upcharges may apply at select locations. Premiere tickets are not valid for special events such as marathons, fan screenings, Fathom Events, or concerts. Mobile and website redemption are subject to a convenience fee. Tickets have no expiration date, are not replaced if lost or stolen, and are non-refundable. Only the first e-ticket scanned is admitted; duplicates are not accepted. The e-ticket is non-transferable and may not be copied or resold. See REGmovies.com/terms-conditions.

16b219b1-08e2-4714-a06b-8a0c9628099e.intro: A cold drink at the movies
16b219b1-08e2-4714-a06b-8a0c9628099e.description: This Regal Small Drink Voucher covers your next trip to the concession stand with a small soft drink that never expires. It makes a great gift or reward, redeemable at all Regal locations.
16b219b1-08e2-4714-a06b-8a0c9628099e.instructions: Print this entire voucher, or present the scannable QR code on your mobile device at the concession stand at any Regal theatre (regmovies.com). Hand it to the attendant to redeem for one small soft drink. Then enjoy the show.
16b219b1-08e2-4714-a06b-8a0c9628099e.terms: Each voucher is redeemable for one Small Soft Drink at any Regal concession counter. Carries no cash value. Does not expire. Fees apply if a larger size item is requested. Not valid for any alcoholic beverage. Not valid with any other offer. Vouchers will not be replaced if lost or stolen.

1776b70f-f521-49af-9f7b-043b4cf73d1c.description: This Regal Small Popcorn Voucher covers your next trip to the concession stand with a small popcorn that never expires. It makes a great gift or reward, redeemable at all Regal locations.
1776b70f-f521-49af-9f7b-043b4cf73d1c.instructions: Print this entire voucher, or present the scannable QR code on your mobile device at the concession stand at any Regal theatre (regmovies.com). Hand it to the attendant to redeem for one small popcorn. Then enjoy the show.
1776b70f-f521-49af-9f7b-043b4cf73d1c.terms: Each voucher is redeemable for one Small Popcorn at any Regal concession counter. Carries no cash value. Does not expire. Fees apply if a larger size item is requested. Not valid with any other offer. Vouchers will not be replaced if lost or stolen.

82688742-4728-42c8-a5db-0aa18cc6a81e.intro: Gear up for a life outdoors
82688742-4728-42c8-a5db-0aa18cc6a81e.description: REI is a member-owned outdoor co-op that has been helping people experience the transformational power of nature since 1938. It offers top-quality gear, apparel, expert advice, and rentals, and reinvests in stewarding the outdoors with every purchase.
82688742-4728-42c8-a5db-0aa18cc6a81e.instructions: Redeem online at REI.com by entering your gift card number and PIN at checkout, in store via the store locator, or by phone at 1-800-426-4840 by giving the associate your card number and PIN. The card has no expiry. Check your current balance at REI.com/gift-card-balance, at any REI store, or by calling 1-855-873-5456.
82688742-4728-42c8-a5db-0aa18cc6a81e.terms: This card is issued by REI Customer Services, Inc. and may be redeemed for merchandise at REI stores, REI.com, or 1-800-426-4840. It is not refundable or redeemable for cash or credit (except where required by law) and cannot be replaced if lost or stolen (except where required by law). This card does not expire. Not for resale. For current balance, visit REI.com/gift-card-balance, go to your nearest REI store, or call 1-855-873-5456. Purchase, use, or acceptance constitutes acceptance of the Terms and Conditions at REI.com/gift-card, which may change at any time.

ee9fea50-f5ee-49cd-850b-db4d6877a45f.description: Reitmans (Canada) Limited gift cards are the ultimate fashion gift for any occasion. They are redeemable online and in store across all three brands: Reitmans, RW&CO. and Penningtons.
ee9fea50-f5ee-49cd-850b-db4d6877a45f.instructions: Redeem in store by presenting the gift card to the cashier at any Reitmans, RW&CO. or Penningtons location, or online at reitmans.com by entering your gift card number and PIN at checkout. The card does not expire. For your balance, check your last receipt, visit any store, or call 1-866-REITMAN.
ee9fea50-f5ee-49cd-850b-db4d6877a45f.terms: Use of this Gift Card constitutes acceptance of these terms. Card must be activated before redemption. Redeemable online and in store at any Reitmans (Canada) Limited division (Penningtons, Reitmans, and RW&CO.). Sales taxes apply at redemption. Unused balance carries over. Merchandise returns are credited to the original or a new Card. May not be returned, cancelled, or exchanged for cash except where required by law. Reitmans is not responsible for lost, stolen, or damaged Cards. Treat Card like cash. For balance, visit any store or call 1-866-REITMAN. Cards do not expire.

acf3049c-8afa-42e6-9e65-95efbb1a77f9.description: RentacarGift offers the world's only multi-brand car-rental gift card, with a choice of 500 rental providers including Hertz, Enterprise, Alamo, Dollar, Budget and Sixt. A unique split-payment feature lets you use two cards plus bonus travel rewards.
acf3049c-8afa-42e6-9e65-95efbb1a77f9.instructions: Redeem online only at rentacargift.com: register an account, click Book Trip or Redeem, then search and book based on your needs. At checkout, paste your eGift card code into the Redeem box and submit (up to two codes per transaction). For residents of North America, gift cards do not expire. For help, visit faqs.tripgift.com.
acf3049c-8afa-42e6-9e65-95efbb1a77f9.terms: A maximum of 2 eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the cards' value, pay the difference by Visa, MasterCard, or American Express. Cards expire 12 months from issuance, except in North America, where they do not expire (Ireland 60 months; Australia and Germany 36 months), subject to local law. For full currency and country redemption terms, visit tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx. All content, customer service, tickets, and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. For questions, visit faqs.tripgift.com.

df2b13f6-6b76-4bf0-b7bf-5fa0bac71498.description: RentacarGift offers the world's only multi-brand car-rental gift card, with a choice of 500 rental providers across 30,000 airport locations, including Hertz, Enterprise, Alamo, Dollar, Budget and Sixt. It is the flexible way to gift a rental.
df2b13f6-6b76-4bf0-b7bf-5fa0bac71498.instructions: Redeem online only at rentacargift.com: register an account, click Book Trip or Redeem, then search and book based on your needs. At checkout, paste your eGift card code into the Redeem box, agree to the T&Cs, and click Order now (up to two codes per transaction). The card is valid for 12 months from activation or last use. For help, visit faqs.tripgift.com.
df2b13f6-6b76-4bf0-b7bf-5fa0bac71498.terms: A maximum of 2 eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the value of the cards, you may pay the difference by Visa, MasterCard, or American Express. Valid for 12 months from activation or last use, subject to local law (Ireland 60 months; Australia and Germany 36 months). For full currency and country redemption terms, visit tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx. All website content, customer service, tickets, and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. For questions, visit faqs.tripgift.com.

2489c478-29a8-494e-adaf-a90b234bc09f.description: RentacarGift offers the world's only multi-brand car-rental gift card, with a choice of 500 rental providers including Hertz, Enterprise, Alamo, Dollar, Budget and Sixt. It is the flexible way to gift a rental from hundreds of trusted brands.
2489c478-29a8-494e-adaf-a90b234bc09f.instructions: Redeem at rentacargift.com: register or sign in, choose Book and Redeem, search for a rental by location and dates, and enter your gift card code in the redemption box at the payment stage. Any balance above the card value can be settled with a credit or debit card, and you'll receive a booking confirmation once payment is complete.
2489c478-29a8-494e-adaf-a90b234bc09f.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

0cac5bb3-9b5d-4f70-86d6-4a70224ca2f3.intro: The nation's largest dining deals site
0cac5bb3-9b5d-4f70-86d6-4a70224ca2f3.description: Restaurant.com is the nation's largest dining deals site, partnering with more than 16,000 restaurants and online providers nationwide. It connects diners with well-prepared meals at up to 50% off the final bill, having saved customers over $1 billion to date.
0cac5bb3-9b5d-4f70-86d6-4a70224ca2f3.instructions: Redeem your eGift Card online at Dine.Restaurant.com or via the mobile app, following the prompts to exchange it for a restaurant certificate. Then present the certificate on your mobile device or as a printed copy at the restaurant. Minimum spend requirements vary and other restrictions apply; see Dine.Restaurant.com for participating restaurants and full terms.
0cac5bb3-9b5d-4f70-86d6-4a70224ca2f3.terms: Restaurant.com eGift Cards have no cash value and may not be redeemed for cash or directly at any restaurant. By purchasing or redeeming this eGift Card for a restaurant- or merchant-specific certificate, you agree to all terms and conditions at Dine.Restaurant.com. Restaurant.com is not responsible for lost or stolen eGift Cards. There is no expiration date on the eGift Cards. No refunds. Questions or comments? Call 888-745-6989.

7b8bc960-274a-40a4-a2f7-0e0d1c88d961.intro: Top up your e-wallets with ease
7b8bc960-274a-40a4-a2f7-0e0d1c88d961.description: A Rewarble Gift Card gives you the flexibility to top up e-wallets like PayPal, AdvCash and Payeer for online transactions, without using your bank account directly. You can also create a virtual Visa card for repeated use with your Rewarble credit.
7b8bc960-274a-40a4-a2f7-0e0d1c88d961.instructions: Visit the Rewarble redemption site at rewarble.com/redeem, enter your 16-digit Rewarble Top-Up Card number, and choose your product. For e-wallet top-ups, provide your e-wallet email or account ID and the funds are credited instantly; for a Visa, a virtual card with number, CVV and expiry is created for you. Processing fees apply, detailed at rewarble.com/fees.
7b8bc960-274a-40a4-a2f7-0e0d1c88d961.terms: Purchasing a Rewarble Gift Card is a secure way to fund your e-wallet accounts using a variety of payment options. While Rewarble Gift Cards offer worldwide utility, please be aware of the processing fees detailed at rewarble.com/fees. Before using the service, review the terms and conditions at rewarble.com/terms-and-conditions. For assistance, the customer support team is available to address inquiries and provide guidance.

e312d1a5-e15f-4741-87bd-b65608f75891.description: NeoCurrency Reward Choice lets you reward yourself from over 100 top brands. Just select a brand, enter the value you want, and confirm; you can even split your choice across multiple brands while you have a remaining balance.
e312d1a5-e15f-4741-87bd-b65608f75891.instructions: Click your reward link to open your reward choices, then select a brand from the available options and enter the value you want. Confirm your selection to claim your reward, splitting across multiple brands as long as you have a remaining balance. No account or password is needed; return to your reward link any time. Note that links expire on the date stated on the reward.
e312d1a5-e15f-4741-87bd-b65608f75891.terms: Issued with no charge to the recipient as a promotional incentive or reward only. Please treat this reward like cash. Links expire on the date stated on the reward. Reward is intended for the original recipient and cannot be sold, transferred, or exchanged. Balance may be redeemed for brand rewards. Balances from separate programs cannot be combined. All reward selections are final.

8028833d-048c-4360-94d0-39dc1aaee463.description: NeoCurrency Reward Choice Specialty lets you reward yourself from over 100 top brands. Just select a brand, enter the value you want, and confirm; you can split your choice across multiple brands as long as you have a remaining balance.
8028833d-048c-4360-94d0-39dc1aaee463.instructions: Click your reward link to open your reward choices, then select a brand from the available options and enter the value you want. 8028833d-048c-4360-94d0-39dc1aaee463.terms: Issued with no charge to the recipient as a promotional incentive or reward only. Please treat this reward like cash. 2cdaba1c-00d8-4d4f-b6ae-9570fe1ce938.intro: Health and wellness essentials, made easy
2cdaba1c-00d8-4d4f-b6ae-9570fe1ce938.description: The Rexall Gift Card helps your loved ones feel cared for, redeemable on a wide assortment of health and wellness essentials at over 400 locations across Canada. With more than 100 years of heritage, Rexall is one of Canada's most trusted pharmacies.
2cdaba1c-00d8-4d4f-b6ae-9570fe1ce938.instructions: Present this eGift to a sales associate for redemption at any participating Rexall store in Canada via rexall.ca. Purchases are deducted from the card balance, and your receipt shows the remaining balance until it reaches zero. The card cannot be used toward gift cards or prescriptions. For balance inquiries, call 1-888-261-6610; find a store at rexall.ca.
2cdaba1c-00d8-4d4f-b6ae-9570fe1ce938.terms: This Gift Card is redeemable for merchandise at any participating Rexall store in Canada and cannot be redeemed against the purchase of Gift Cards or prescriptions. Purchases are deducted from the Gift Card, with your receipt showing the remaining balance until it reaches zero. This card is not redeemable for cash and cannot be replaced if lost or stolen. Protect this card and treat it like cash. For balance inquiries, call 1-888-261-6610. Visit rexall.ca to find a store near you. Rexall is a member of Rexall Pharmacy Group Ltd.

fb8ff9d1-8aa7-4712-a020-1c9d63a2146c.intro: Currency for your favorite Riot games
fb8ff9d1-8aa7-4712-a020-1c9d63a2146c.description: This Riot Games card delivers virtual currency redeemable in League of Legends, Teamfight Tactics, Legends of Runeterra and VALORANT. It is redeemable only on the North American Riot servers.
fb8ff9d1-8aa7-4712-a020-1c9d63a2146c.instructions: Redeem this card on the North American Riot servers to add virtual currency for League of Legends, Teamfight Tactics, Legends of Runeterra, or VALORANT. Apply the code in the Riot Games online stores and clients listed at prepaidcards.riotgames.com. For full redemption details and terms, visit prepaidcards.riotgames.com.
fb8ff9d1-8aa7-4712-a020-1c9d63a2146c.terms: This Riot Games virtual currency code permits you to purchase virtual currency to the value printed on the front, for use only at the Riot Games online stores and clients listed at prepaidcards.riotgames.com. Except as required by law, the value will not be replaced if lost, stolen, destroyed, or used without permission. For the full terms and conditions governing the use of this code, please visit prepaidcards.riotgames.com.

91a60dab-4223-4a64-9fb2-d83036849e66.intro: Find happiness in the smallest moments
91a60dab-4223-4a64-9fb2-d83036849e66.description: Rituals unveils the seemingly meaningless moments of daily life and reminds you to enjoy them, from a long bath to a richly scented home. Inspired by Asian traditions, its luxurious yet affordable home and body collection is built around unique signature fragrances.
91a60dab-4223-4a64-9fb2-d83036849e66.instructions: Redeem this digital gift card in a Rituals boutique by presenting the barcode (find a boutique using the store locator at rituals.com), or online by selecting Rituals gift card as your payment method at checkout and entering your 19-digit code followed by the PIN. The amount is deducted automatically and the card has no expiry. Keep your card safe for up to 30 days after full redemption in case a refund is needed.
91a60dab-4223-4a64-9fb2-d83036849e66.terms: The amount on the digital gift card can be redeemed all at once or across multiple orders. No expiry. Digital gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash. Any refunds on items purchased with a digital gift card are credited back to the same gift card. If lost, stolen, or used without authorization, it cannot be replaced unless registered for balance protection at theultimatediningcard.ca. 95ff5876-88f5-4ffd-9356-f0400a831a27.description: The Nature Conservancy is the leading conservation organization working worldwide to protect ecologically important lands and waters for nature and people. Since 1951 it has protected more than 119 million acres of land and thousands of miles of rivers, working in 69 countries to address the most pressing conservation threats.
95ff5876-88f5-4ffd-9356-f0400a831a27.instructions: To redeem, go to charityontop.org, select Redeem, enter your card number, and search for The Nature Conservancy under organization name. 85% of the card's value is redeemable as a contribution to a qualified 501(c)(3) charity. This card does not expire. Retain your receipt for your tax records.
95ff5876-88f5-4ffd-9356-f0400a831a27.terms: Issued by Charity On Top Foundation, Inc., a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt charity (#81-1198370) registered in California, USA. Not refundable or redeemable for cash or credit and cannot be replaced if deleted, lost, or stolen. Does not expire and is not for resale. Questions? Call 800-JOY-1029.

9758967b-fc5d-47b6-9105-6ac4477bb93e.description: The Palm is a classic American steakhouse famed for prime steaks, jumbo Nova Scotia lobster and Italian-inspired dishes. Its walls lined with celebrity caricatures and its bustling, old-school energy have made it a dining institution for decades.

5d5b39c8-5bea-4999-90a3-cd20ba609d9f.description: The Vegan Gift Card takes the guesswork out of finding a suitable vegan gift, letting your loved one choose from a range of carefully selected vegan brands. 5d5b39c8-5bea-4999-90a3-cd20ba609d9f.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. From cutting-edge supplements to knowledgeable in-store Health Enthusiasts, inspiration is always in stock.
ce5c81d8-e92a-4ced-aec8-d6edc3c62538.instructions: To redeem in store, display the gift card number and PIN to the cashier, who will hand-key them into the POS. For balance inquiries, visit a The Vitamin Shoppe store, go to www.vitaminshoppe.com, or call 1-800-223-1216.
ce5c81d8-e92a-4ced-aec8-d6edc3c62538.terms: Redeemable for merchandise at The Vitamin Shoppe stores and online at www.vitaminshoppe.com. For details or balance inquiries, visit a store, go to www.vitaminshoppe.com, or call 1-800-223-1216.

90f9b621-2b51-4da4-93b9-14f6a3011c3e.description: The Wellness Card is all about you and your wellbeing, with an extensive range of experiences to help you centre yourself and enjoy some me-time. Choose from wellness experiences to enjoy at home or in person with one of the Wellness Partners.

Alternatively, choose an at-home experience, add the product to your basket, and check out using your Wellness Card balance. The card is valid for 12 months.
90f9b621-2b51-4da4-93b9-14f6a3011c3e.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Valid for 12 months. 98a779c8-1a2d-4291-89a8-7421b8c9a33d.intro: Let them see any show, anytime
98a779c8-1a2d-4291-89a8-7421b8c9a33d.description: Theatre Tokens are nationwide theatre gift vouchers accepted at more than 300 venues across the UK, including all of London's West End. With no expiry date, they're the perfect gift for anyone, at any time, letting them see the show they want, when they want.
98a779c8-1a2d-4291-89a8-7421b8c9a33d.instructions: Present your eGift at the box office of any participating theatre to purchase tickets, subject to availability (booking fees may apply). Register your eGift at theatretokens.com to protect it, check your balance, and get offers. The card has no expiry.
98a779c8-1a2d-4291-89a8-7421b8c9a33d.terms: Register your eGift to protect it, check your balance, and get offers at theatretokens.com (T&Cs apply). eGifts can be used to purchase tickets at any participating theatre at the time of redemption (subject to availability; booking fees may apply). They cannot be transferred for value, redeemed, or exchanged for cash, and no cash change is given. Cannot be used to purchase other eGifts, gift vouchers, or gift cards. Theatre Tokens is not liable for lost, stolen, destroyed, or damaged eGifts, and cannot replace an eGift unless previously registered at theatretokens.com.

d55639e7-6683-4a31-bc83-f257042a1556.description: ThirdLove is an American lingerie company that puts fit, comfort, and quality first, with over 60 sizes including half cups. d55639e7-6683-4a31-bc83-f257042a1556.instructions: ThirdLove gift cards can be redeemed online only, in the United States, for authorized goods at www.thirdlove.com by entering your gift card information at checkout. For balance information and customer service, visit thirdlove.giftcardhelp.com. This gift card will not expire.
d55639e7-6683-4a31-bc83-f257042a1556.terms: Purchase or use of this gift card constitutes acceptance of the terms at thirdlove.giftcardhelp.com and the following terms. Redeemable in the United States only for authorized goods at www.thirdlove.com. Not redeemable for cash or credit, nor will it be replaced or refunded except where required by law. For refund or customer service inquiries, contact thirdlove@giftcardhelp.com. For customer service and balance information, visit thirdlove.giftcardhelp.com. Issued and administered by TGCM TDLV. Will not expire. Resale is strictly prohibited without consent of the issuer.

e46e575b-21de-4662-b849-5d6086b1481b.description: thredUP is one of the world's largest online consignment and thrift stores, carrying over 55,000 women's and kids' brands, from Gap to Gucci, all up to 90% off estimated retail. It's sustainable style that reduces fashion waste while filling closets with great clothes for way less.
e46e575b-21de-4662-b849-5d6086b1481b.instructions: thredUP gift cards can be redeemed online, in the United States only, for authorized goods at www.thredup.com by entering the card details at checkout. For balance information and customer service, visit thredup.giftcardassistance.com. This gift card will not expire.

Not redeemable for cash or credit, nor will it be replaced or refunded except where required by law. For refund or customer service inquiries, contact thredup@giftcardassistance.com. 9cba218f-742c-4940-9adc-556642a0d4b5.intro: Top up your Three mobile, anytime
9cba218f-742c-4940-9adc-556642a0d4b5.description: Three PIN is a quick and easy way to top up your Three mobile phone credit with an online prepaid code. Redeem your Three Top Up via My3 anytime, anywhere, whether for your own account or as a gift to someone else.
9cba218f-742c-4940-9adc-556642a0d4b5.instructions: Redeem your Three Top Up code using any of these options: call 444 free from within the UK (or +44 7782 333 444 from abroad) and select Top up by voucher, then enter your 16-digit code; log into My3 and follow the Top up your account instructions; or use Three's web direct top-up by entering the number, selecting Voucher, and hitting Top up now. Visit three.co.uk for more.
9cba218f-742c-4940-9adc-556642a0d4b5.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

a462361e-11f0-4b5e-a891-1462ef733451.description: Ticket Jones is an after-market ticket supplier offering premium sport, concert, theatre, and special event tickets worldwide. With a vast selection across many price categories, it specializes in up-front seating, sold-out events, and hard-to-obtain tickets, including everything from major tours to the Super Bowl.
a462361e-11f0-4b5e-a891-1462ef733451.instructions: Visit ticketjones.com, select the items you'd like to buy, and proceed to checkout. Enter your gift code when prompted, then click Redeem Code; up to 10 gift codes may be used per order. If the order total exceeds the code amount, you'll be asked for another payment method or code. For questions during ordering, call 800-281-0753.
a462361e-11f0-4b5e-a891-1462ef733451.terms: Gift codes are redeemable for merchandise only. If the order total exceeds the gift code amount, you will be asked for another form of payment or another gift code. Up to 10 gift codes may be used per purchase, or contact Ticket Jones to combine codes. Not redeemable for cash and cannot be returned for a cash refund. If the code amount exceeds the purchase, the balance is held on the gift code. Ticket Jones is not responsible for weather delays, postponements, cancellations, or lost or stolen tickets; for cancelled events, your balance is restored to your gift code. All sales are final.

f5aa4e19-1b26-4f78-8c3c-300443716462.intro: Your ticket to live events across the UK
f5aa4e19-1b26-4f78-8c3c-300443716462.description: Ticketmaster is the UK's go-to source for live event tickets, from theatre, comedy and family shows to gigs, festivals and major sporting fixtures. New events are added daily, making the gift card a flexible present for any fan.
f5aa4e19-1b26-4f78-8c3c-300443716462.instructions: Browse and select tickets for your event at ticketmaster.co.uk, then proceed to checkout and choose Gift Card as your payment method. Enter the 16- or 19-digit gift card number along with the 3-digit security number; if a balance remains you can add another gift card or pay the rest by credit or debit card. Up to five gift cards may be used per purchase, and cards cannot be applied to resale tickets. The card is activated at purchase and expires 12 months after activation, after which any remaining balance is lost.
f5aa4e19-1b26-4f78-8c3c-300443716462.terms: Ticketmaster e-Gift Cards can be used to buy eligible tickets and associated products for UK events online at ticketmaster.co.uk. Cards are activated at the time of purchase and expire 12 months after activation; once expired, any remaining balance is no longer available. Treat the card like cash, as a lost or stolen card and its balance cannot be replaced. The card has no cash redemption value and cannot be exchanged for cash. Full terms are available at terms.ticketmastergiftcard.com/UK.

b124ee02-77b8-4fe5-acd1-13b3dc9c59a5.description: TIDAL is a global music and video streaming service built for fans, with a catalogue of more than 60 million songs and over 250,000 high-quality videos. Choose between standard sound quality or lossless HiFi, with offline listening, curated editorial and exclusives included.
b124ee02-77b8-4fe5-acd1-13b3dc9c59a5.instructions: Redeem your card at www.TIDAL.com/GiftCards by entering your 10-digit code and following the sign-up prompts. The card can start a new TIDAL subscription or add a payment to an existing account, and applies toward monthly subscription fees for either the Premium or HiFi tier. Internet access and compatible hardware are required, and you must be 18 or older (or have a parent or guardian's permission) to sign up. The card does not expire and carries no fees.
b124ee02-77b8-4fe5-acd1-13b3dc9c59a5.terms: This card may be used to start a new TIDAL subscription or pay on an existing account, and applies only toward monthly subscription fees; it is not valid in the TIDAL store. Internet access and compatible hardware are required. You must be 18 or older, or have a parent's permission, to sign up. The card is not redeemable for cash, cannot be refunded once redeemed, and balances are non-transferable. TIDAL is not responsible for lost, damaged or stolen cards. The card does not expire and no fees apply. Full terms at TIDAL.com/US/TERMS.

c9e98e90-17ca-4d00-90b5-176cbe8c6087.description: Tijuana Flats serves fresh, fast, made-to-order Tex-Mex in a fun, offbeat setting complete with quirky wall art and a hot sauce bar. The menu features 100% hormone-free white-meat chicken, fresh produce and lard-free, trans-fat-free cooking.
c9e98e90-17ca-4d00-90b5-176cbe8c6087.instructions: Redeem in person at any Tijuana Flats restaurant by providing your gift card number to the staff at checkout. The card can be used across multiple visits until the balance is spent. To check your remaining balance, visit www.cardbalance.net or call 1-888-892-3813 and enter the card number. Learn more at tijuanaflats.com.
c9e98e90-17ca-4d00-90b5-176cbe8c6087.terms: This ecard has no value until activated by the merchant, and use constitutes acceptance of these terms. Tijuana Flats is not responsible for lost, stolen or damaged ecards, or any unauthorized use, unless required by applicable law. The ecard is redeemable for services and merchandise only and cannot be redeemed for cash. No service fees are charged. To check the balance, visit www.cardbalance.net or call 1-888-892-3813 and enter the card number.

4d97df7a-f70b-4d68-a6aa-0accb9a31e77.intro: Coffee, treats and everyday Tims runs
4d97df7a-f70b-4d68-a6aa-0accb9a31e77.description: A digital Tim Card is a simple way to treat a friend or mark a special day. It's redeemable for coffee, food and more at participating Tim Hortons restaurants across Canada.
4d97df7a-f70b-4d68-a6aa-0accb9a31e77.instructions: To redeem, download the Tim Hortons mobile app, log in or register, then tap Scan to Pay followed by Transfer Balance from another Tim Card and enter the Tim Card number and PIN. Don't have the app? Print this page or save it as a PDF and present it at any Tim Hortons restaurant when paying. The card value is a prepayment for goods and services at participating locations only.
4d97df7a-f70b-4d68-a6aa-0accb9a31e77.terms: The value on a Tim Card is a prepayment for goods and services at participating Tim Hortons restaurants only. There are no deposit accounts, lines of credit or overdraft protection associated with the card, and the balance is non-refundable and cannot be redeemed for cash unless required by law. No interest or earnings accrue, and the value is not insured by the CDIC or FDIC. Tim Hortons may decline, refuse or limit use of any card it reasonably believes is unauthorized, fraudulent or unlawful. Full terms at timhortons.com/ca/en/timcard/timcard-terms-conditions.php.

905846e6-735e-463e-afa6-542bb5158e50.intro: Online courses to build new skills
905846e6-735e-463e-afa6-542bb5158e50.description: Alpha Academy is an online learning platform offering more than 2,000 courses to a community of over 500,000 learners. Topics range from Time Management and Digital Marketing to Beginner's Spanish and Fire Safety Training, whether you're sharpening existing skills or starting something new.
905846e6-735e-463e-afa6-542bb5158e50.instructions: To redeem, go to alphaacademy.org/redeem-voucher and fill in your details, then enter the unique voucher code you received. Wait for your course name to appear, then click Submit to unlock unlimited access to the course. A free PDF certificate is available on completion by contacting customer support. Redeem within 60 days of purchase, as the voucher code expires after that.
905846e6-735e-463e-afa6-542bb5158e50.terms: The voucher grants unlimited access to the course. The same course cannot be redeemed twice by the same account. A free PDF certificate is available after finishing the course; contact customer support to claim it. A hard copy certificate is not free and carries a separate cost. The voucher code expires within 60 days of purchase, so redeem the course before then.

32c928db-9247-4f8b-9b8f-ce988cda3584.intro: Designer labels for up to 60% less
32c928db-9247-4f8b-9b8f-ce988cda3584.description: TK Maxx is Europe's leading off-price retailer, with over 500 TK Maxx stores and more than 50 Homesense stores. Its buyers scour the globe year-round for designer labels and one-off finds at up to 60% less than the recommended retail price.

bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.intro: The home of the Great British roast
bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.description: Toby Carvery does the classic British roast properly, with tender slow-cooked meats, hand-checked ruffled roasties, freshly made Yorkshire puddings and all the trimmings every day. Beyond the carvery you'll find tasty specials, all-you-can-eat breakfasts and even comfy accommodation at some restaurants.
bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.instructions: Redeem this gift card in person at any Toby Carvery in the UK, as well as other Mitchells & Butlers venues; present it to staff when paying and the amount is deducted from your balance. No change is given, but any remaining balance can be used on future visits. Check your balance at www.tobycarvery.co.uk/giftcards. The card is valid for 12 months from the date of purchase.
bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.terms: This card may not be exchanged for cash and is not a cheque guarantee, credit, debit or charge card. No change is given, but the balance can be used for future purchases. We are not liable for lost or stolen cards, so protect it like cash. To check the balance, visit www.tobycarvery.co.uk/giftcards. The card is valid for 12 months from the date of purchase and can be used at any UK venue, plus other Mitchells & Butlers venues. Cards can be loaded from £5 up to £250. Text and email gift cards should be treated as cash and will not be resent if deleted. We reserve the right to amend these terms.

1298f312-8188-4993-ad93-074924e1cfb6.description: Tom Thumb is part of the Albertsons Companies family of grocery stores, a leader in the industry. The gift card is accepted at over 2,000 locations across the US, including Albertsons, Safeway, Randalls, Vons, Jewel-Osco, Acme and more.
1298f312-8188-4993-ad93-074924e1cfb6.instructions: Use this card for merchandise purchases at any of the listed Albertsons family stores, including Tom Thumb, Safeway and Vons. Present the card at checkout; it can be used multiple times until the value is depleted. Non-merchandise items such as gift cards, money orders and lottery are excluded. To check your balance, call 866-252-3780. The card does not expire and has no fees.
1298f312-8188-4993-ad93-074924e1cfb6.terms: The card may be used for merchandise purchases only at the listed stores; non-merchandise purchases such as gift cards, money orders and lottery are not allowed. aa1ee989-cd4f-4263-87b7-0c6538e53471.intro: That island feeling, no island required
aa1ee989-cd4f-4263-87b7-0c6538e53471.description: Tommy Bahama celebrates the finer things in life through fashion, food and friends. Its retail stores, full-service restaurants and casual Marlin Bars all showcase its signature island-inspired apparel and accessories.
aa1ee989-cd4f-4263-87b7-0c6538e53471.instructions: To redeem online, enter the gift card number and PIN during checkout at tommybahama.com. To redeem in store, print this page and show it to the associate, or display the barcode, gift card number and PIN from your mobile device for the cashier to scan or key in at the register. The card is valid at US Tommy Bahama full-price stores, outlets, restaurants and tommybahama.com. It does not expire and carries no dormancy fees.
aa1ee989-cd4f-4263-87b7-0c6538e53471.terms: This card is valid at US Tommy Bahama full-price stores, outlets, restaurants and tommybahama.com, but not at the Tommy Bahama Home Store. The card is not replaceable if lost, stolen or damaged, though remaining value may be transferred to a new card with original proof of purchase. Void if altered, resold or transferred for value. The card does not expire and no dormancy fees apply. Questions: Guest Services at (866) 986-8282. Issued by Viewpoint Marketing, Inc.

613d28f2-68d3-44a9-ae0c-9bbf4abe7340.description: Tommy John began with the patented Stay-Tucked Undershirt and now specializes in men's and women's underwear, lingerie, pajamas, loungewear and casual apparel. Its proprietary fabrics are designed to feel more comfortable and move with the body.
613d28f2-68d3-44a9-ae0c-9bbf4abe7340.instructions: Redeem online at tommyjohn.com by entering your gift card information at checkout, or use the card at participating Tommy John retail stores. For balance and customer service, visit tommyjohn.giftcardhelp.com. The card does not expire.
613d28f2-68d3-44a9-ae0c-9bbf4abe7340.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. It is redeemable in the United States only for authorized goods at tommyjohn.com and participating retail locations. The card does not expire, and resale is prohibited without the issuer's consent. For customer service and balance, visit tommyjohn.giftcardhelp.com. Issued and administered by TGCM TJIN, LLC.

68107cc0-0e0b-4eae-9034-4ecfd0dd5acc.intro: Golf, games, food and good times
68107cc0-0e0b-4eae-9034-4ecfd0dd5acc.description: Topgolf blends golf with loud music, giant targets, big-screen TVs and a hand-crafted food and beverage menu, all under one roof. It's an easy invitation to grab family, friends or coworkers and come play around.
68107cc0-0e0b-4eae-9034-4ecfd0dd5acc.instructions: Redeem online at participating Topgolf sites, or use the card in person at any US Topgolf location. To redeem in store, show your eGift card at Guest Services or in the bay so an associate can scan the barcode or key in the 19-digit number and PIN, then deduct the purchase from your balance. To check your balance, visit topgolf.com/cardbalance. The card has no expiration date and incurs no dormancy fees.
68107cc0-0e0b-4eae-9034-4ecfd0dd5acc.terms: This card is issued by Topgolf Pro, LLC, and use constitutes acceptance of these terms. It cannot be redeemed until activated, and purchases are deducted from the balance until it reaches zero. The card is redeemable at any US Topgolf location and online at participating Topgolf sites, and cannot be redeemed for cash except where required by law. Treat it as cash, as it will not be replaced if lost or stolen except where required by law. The card has no expiration date and no dormancy fees. For balance, visit topgolf.com/cardbalance.

ff6eaa9c-7a0d-46b6-8b94-a02fedac7019.description: Tot Squad connects new parents with top-rated certified providers, in person or by video, for the help that matters most. Popular services include sleep training, car seat safety checks, lactation consultations and nutrition coaching, with the flexibility to choose a provider who matches your parenting style.
ff6eaa9c-7a0d-46b6-8b94-a02fedac7019.instructions: To redeem, visit book.totsquad.com and enter the PIN provided in your email to book your service. See full terms at totsquad.com/terms-of-use.
ff6eaa9c-7a0d-46b6-8b94-a02fedac7019.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Full terms and conditions are available at totsquad.com/terms-of-use.

7331ff61-3b2c-4a3e-9262-a4c841f66ccd.intro: America's largest fine wine, beer and spirits store
7331ff61-3b2c-4a3e-9262-a4c841f66ccd.description: Total Wine & More is America's largest independent retailer of fine wine, beer and spirits, with over 200 stores across 25 states. With more than 8,000 wines, 3,000 spirits and 2,500 beers at everyday low prices, plus expertly trained associates, it offers a shopping experience like no other.
7331ff61-3b2c-4a3e-9262-a4c841f66ccd.instructions: Gift cards are redeemable online at totalwine.com and at Total Wine & More locations; find your nearest store at totalwine.com/store-finder. In store, present the printed page or your mobile device to the cashier, who will scan the barcode or key in the gift card number and PIN at the register. You must be 21 or older with valid ID to redeem, and cards are not redeemable in New York locations. To check your balance, call 1-888-527-4590. The card does not expire and no fees apply.
7331ff61-3b2c-4a3e-9262-a4c841f66ccd.terms: Use of this gift card constitutes acceptance of these terms. It is redeemable up to its balance for goods or services at participating Total Wine & More US locations, but not at New York locations. It is not refundable or redeemable for cash except as required by law, and is not reloadable. The card does not expire and no fees apply. Safeguard it as it will not be replaced if lost, stolen, damaged or used without authorization. You must be 21 or older with valid ID to redeem. Issued by Retail Services & Systems, Inc. For balance, call 1-888-527-4590. Full terms at totalwine.com/gift-cards.

bd7a1d13-833e-4122-bde1-ccddf30a9072.intro: Book private tours and travel experiences
bd7a1d13-833e-4122-bde1-ccddf30a9072.description: ToursGift lets you book local and international private tours online, with more than 20,000 flight-plus-hotel and tour experiences and a wide selection of package getaways. Choose from dining experiences, hot air balloon or helicopter rides, safaris, yacht trips and road trips to create lasting memories.
bd7a1d13-833e-4122-bde1-ccddf30a9072.instructions: Redeem online at tripgift.com by registering an account, choosing your tour or package, and entering your eGift card code at checkout. Up to two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value, pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. For North American residents, including Canada, the gift cards do not expire. For help, visit faqs.tripgift.com.
bd7a1d13-833e-4122-bde1-ccddf30a9072.terms: A maximum of two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value, you may pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. For North American residents the gift cards do not expire. All website content, customer service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms on currency and country-of-residence redemption are at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx, and FAQs at faqs.tripgift.com.

af3e2754-0b87-4341-b3cd-fd637d4d1cf8.intro: Book private tours and travel experiences
af3e2754-0b87-4341-b3cd-fd637d4d1cf8.description: ToursGift offers everything you need to book local and international private tours, with over 20,000 flight-plus-hotel and tour experiences or package getaways. af3e2754-0b87-4341-b3cd-fd637d4d1cf8.instructions: Redeem online only at toursgift.com: register an account, click Book Trip then Redeem, and search and select your tour or product. Up to two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction, with any difference payable by Visa, MasterCard or American Express. The gift card is valid for 12 months from activation or last use.
af3e2754-0b87-4341-b3cd-fd637d4d1cf8.terms: A maximum of two eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value, you may pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. All website content, customer service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx, and FAQs at faqs.tripgift.com.

28b4cf3c-564b-4680-acd3-2c91cbeee3f8.intro: Top up your TQ game account
28b4cf3c-564b-4680-acd3-2c91cbeee3f8.description: TQ Digital Entertainment is an online game developer and publisher behind massively multiplayer and casual titles such as Conquer Online. The TQ Game Card adds game points to your account so you can keep playing.
28b4cf3c-564b-4680-acd3-2c91cbeee3f8.instructions: Redeem the card by signing in to your TQ / 99.com account and entering the card number and PIN on the official TQ Point recharge page to credit your account with game points. An internet connection and a compatible PC are required to play.
28b4cf3c-564b-4680-acd3-2c91cbeee3f8.terms: This TQ Point prepaid card may be redeemed only in the USA and Canada at credit.99.com. The full value is deducted at PIN redemption; no incremental deductions are allowed. Not redeemable for cash, returnable, or for resale except where required by law. The issuer is not responsible for lost or stolen cards. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Use signifies acceptance of all applicable rules, the privacy policy and end-user licence agreements at account.99.com.

0cb6834c-0dc9-4563-b265-51d479c8c81a.description: Tractor Supply Company is America's go-to store for recreational farmers, ranchers, homeowners, gardeners and pet owners. With more than 2,200 stores across 49 states, it stocks everything from home improvement and lawn and garden supplies to livestock, equine and pet care.
0cb6834c-0dc9-4563-b265-51d479c8c81a.instructions: Redeem your Tractor Supply gift card for merchandise at any Tractor Supply store in the US or online at TractorSupply.com. In store, present the card at the register; online, enter your card number and PIN at checkout. The card has no expiration date.
0cb6834c-0dc9-4563-b265-51d479c8c81a.terms: Redeemable for merchandise at TractorSupply.com or any Tractor Supply company store in the US. The card must be present for in-store purchases and is not redeemable for cash or credit except where required by law. It cannot be used to make payments on a charge account or to buy another gift card. No expiration date. Lost or stolen cards can only be replaced on presentation of the original sales receipt for any remaining balance.

9b5a42dd-5178-4076-8cf7-b74a283ccd79.description: TravelGift is a flexible travel gift card redeemable against flights, holidays, cruises, hotels, car hire and attractions worldwide. Use it with partners including TUI, BA, Emirates, Eurostar, Royal Caribbean, Princess Cruises, Kuoni and Disneyland Paris.
9b5a42dd-5178-4076-8cf7-b74a283ccd79.instructions: Redeem your TravelGift card online at travelgift.uk/check-gift-card by entering your code, or by email. Use it for full or part payment towards flights, holidays, cruises, hotels, car hire or attractions, with packages ATOL 12576 protected. Redeem within 24 months of purchase.
9b5a42dd-5178-4076-8cf7-b74a283ccd79.terms: Redeemable online at travelgift.uk against flights, holidays, cruises, hotels, car hire and attractions worldwide. Packages are ATOL 12576 protected. Valid for 24 months from purchase. For full terms and conditions visit travelgift.uk/terms-and-conditions.

502499b7-82e3-48db-837c-ea5ddfd5dc24.description: Treatwell is Europe's number-one hair, beauty and wellness booking platform, with thousands of salons and barbershops to choose from. The prepaid e-gift card lets your recipient pick any treatment at any venue and book in seconds online or in the app.
502499b7-82e3-48db-837c-ea5ddfd5dc24.instructions: Enter your code in the dedicated field at checkout on treatwell.co.uk or in the Treatwell app, then create a Treatwell account so any remaining credit isn't lost. The balance can be spent over several bookings until used up; if a booking costs more, pay the difference with another payment method. The card is valid in the UK only.
502499b7-82e3-48db-837c-ea5ddfd5dc24.terms: Treatwell Gift Cards are prepaid vouchers for booking services at treatwell.co.uk and in the Treatwell app, valid in the UK only. They can be spent in instalments until the credit is used up; if the balance is insufficient, pay the difference with another payment method, and any remaining credit can be reused within the validity period. Cards expire on the date specified on each card. Gift Cards are non-returnable and non-refundable. Contact Treatwell Customer Service with any questions.

d15f20a8-60d0-4629-8fe7-9ceba331e266.description: Trevi Italian Restaurant serves traditional Italian cuisine, from house-made pastas to fresh seafood and veal, in a warm, romantic dining room. Its menu pairs regional Italian dishes with a thoughtfully chosen wine list.
d15f20a8-60d0-4629-8fe7-9ceba331e266.instructions: Redeemable at Trevi Italian Restaurant and at any participating venue that accepts the Landry's gift card. Present the physical card to your server or at the host stand, or provide the card number and PIN when paying your bill. The card covers food, beverages and gratuity where permitted.
d15f20a8-60d0-4629-8fe7-9ceba331e266.terms: Issued by MOCGC, Corp. and usable for goods and services at any participating Landry's, Inc. or affiliated US location until the full balance is used. The card has no cash value and, except as required by law, is not redeemable for cash. Resale is strictly prohibited. For balance information or to report a card lost or stolen, call 1-888-345-8380. Full terms at landrysinc.com/giftcards/terms.asp.

508b89a2-7faf-4500-9b52-5e4926e880d3.description: TripGift gives you access to over 1.5 million travel experiences, with 450 airlines, 750,000 hotels, villas and apartments, 20,000 package tours and 500 car rental brands, plus digital media content. Book instantly online with trusted brands like Air Canada, Delta, Marriott, Hilton, Hertz and many more.
508b89a2-7faf-4500-9b52-5e4926e880d3.instructions: Redeem your TripGift card online at tripgift.com by browsing flights, hotels, tours, car hire and digital media, then entering your gift card code at checkout. You can use up to 2 eGift card codes per transaction and pay any difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. For residents of North America, gift cards do not expire.
508b89a2-7faf-4500-9b52-5e4926e880d3.terms: A maximum of 2 eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value you may pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. For North American residents gift cards do not expire (other regions vary by local law). All website content, customer service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx; FAQs at faqs.tripgift.com.

4d43c676-8ad6-4bfa-82d5-8e77732889cf.description: TripGift UK gives you access to over 1.5 million travel experiences online, from flights and hotels to car hire and tours. Book with leading travel brands including British Airways, Air France, KLM, Lufthansa, Delta, Emirates, Marriott, Hilton and Hertz.
4d43c676-8ad6-4bfa-82d5-8e77732889cf.instructions: Redeem your TripGift UK card online only at tripgift.com or in the TripGift app: sign in or create an account, go to the gift card redemption section, enter your unique code and click Redeem to apply the balance, then start booking. You can use up to 2 eGift codes per transaction plus a credit or debit card. Cards are valid for 12 months from first use for GBP and EUR, and 60 months for USD.
4d43c676-8ad6-4bfa-82d5-8e77732889cf.terms: This TripGift category 2 eGift code is valid for Business to Business, Business to Customer or Business to Employee use, subject to applicable local country and state law and any required residual refund balances. You can use up to 2 eGift codes per transaction plus a credit or debit card. Registration is required before use. Full terms at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx.

9d866efb-609d-416f-876d-9eae6518d039.description: The TripGift USA Gift Card unlocks over 1.5 million travel experiences, including 450 airlines, 750,000 hotels and 20,000 package tours worldwide, plus 200+ eLanguage and learning courses. Book accommodation, flights and activities online from trusted brands like Delta, Marriott and Hilton.
9d866efb-609d-416f-876d-9eae6518d039.instructions: Redeem your TripGift USA card online at tripgift.com: browse the travel products and services, select your experience, then enter your unique card code at checkout to complete your purchase. You can use up to 2 eGift card codes per transaction and pay any difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. There is no expiration date for residents of North America; note certain subscriptions may not be eligible.
9d866efb-609d-416f-876d-9eae6518d039.terms: A maximum of 2 eGift card codes are permitted per transaction; if your basket exceeds the card value you may pay the difference with Visa, MasterCard or American Express. For North American residents gift cards do not expire (other regions vary by local law). All website content, customer service, tickets and eVouchers are in English. Gift cards and eVouchers cannot be exchanged or refunded. Full terms at tripgift.com/info/terms-and-conditions.aspx; FAQs at faqs.tripgift.com.

5ad80f69-abc2-4498-9673-f68240b74bfe.description: A TUI eGift is an ideal present for anniversaries, weddings, birthdays and Christmas. Use it as full or part payment for travel products at any TUI travel shop or online at tui.co.uk and firstchoice.co.uk.
5ad80f69-abc2-4498-9673-f68240b74bfe.instructions: Redeem your TUI eGift at tui.co.uk/destinations/info/tui-gift-cards, in a TUI travel shop, or online at tui.co.uk and firstchoice.co.uk; for new online bookings the card must hold enough value to cover the payment due. Check your balance and expiry date at sites.prepaytec.com/chopinweb/balance using your eGift number, by calling 0203 130 0133, or in store, always before redeeming. The minimum loadable balance is GBP 10 and the maximum balance is GBP 1500, in GBP 1 increments.
5ad80f69-abc2-4498-9673-f68240b74bfe.terms: Usable as full or part payment for travel products at all TUI travel shops (excluding Southern Ireland), tui.co.uk and firstchoice.co.uk; online bookings need sufficient funds for the initial payment due. Cannot be used for travel money products, exchanged for cash, or used to buy another gift card. eGift cards expire 2 years from purchase. Maximum balance GBP 1,500. Treat the card as cash; the balance can't be refunded if lost, stolen or destroyed. Not valid in the Republic of Ireland or at crystalski.co.uk, and not covered by ABTA's financial protection scheme.

5b63b916-3374-4393-802f-7fc05d5fe8fe.description: Twitch is where millions of people come together live every day to chat, interact and make their own entertainment together. A Twitch gift card lets you add balance to enjoy what the community has to offer.
5b63b916-3374-4393-802f-7fc05d5fe8fe.instructions: You'll need a valid Twitch account to use this card. Visit twitch.tv/redeem and enter the gift code to add it to your balance. This card can only be redeemed for gift balance accounts denominated in Canadian dollars.
5b63b916-3374-4393-802f-7fc05d5fe8fe.terms: Redeemable only for Canadian-dollar gift balance accounts on twitch.tv, by persons aged 13 and up, for goods and services offered by Twitch or sold on twitch.tv or its applications. Cannot be returned, refunded, resold, exchanged for cash, or used to buy other gift cards, except where required by law. Not redeemable for non-Canadian residents. Non-reloadable, no fees, and does not expire. Treat it like cash; Twitch is not responsible for lost, stolen or misused cards. Issued by Twitch Interactive, Inc. More terms at twitch.tv/legal/giftcard; support and balance at help.twitch.tv.

dda9c5ac-5495-4023-b6fb-47cac1e3d89b.description: Twitch builds communities around live content that's interactive, diverse and always next level. Millions come together every day to chat, interact and make their own entertainment, and we've saved you a seat in chat.
dda9c5ac-5495-4023-b6fb-47cac1e3d89b.instructions: You'll need a valid Twitch account to use this card. Visit twitch.tv/redeem and enter the gift code to add it to your balance. This card can only be redeemed for gift balance accounts denominated in GBP.

fc905fe8-0499-4110-922f-7027a7a21205.intro: A monthly journey through world whisky
fc905fe8-0499-4110-922f-7027a7a21205.description: Whisky52 is a whisky discovery club celebrating the art of distillation, spotlighting both innovation and time-honoured tradition. Each month showcases a different distillery from a different country, paired with a copy of Stramash magazine telling each whisky's story.
fc905fe8-0499-4110-922f-7027a7a21205.instructions: Visit whisky52.com and use your code to create an account. Enter your delivery address and card details, then wait for your whisky to arrive. This code covers one month of the club; afterwards you continue as a member with no minimum commitment.
fc905fe8-0499-4110-922f-7027a7a21205.terms: For new members only; one per household. After the discount ends, you are subscribed as a Whisky52 member (£35/month for one 35cl bottle of whisky and a magazine) with no minimum commitment. Card details are required to redeem. Over 18s only. Location surcharges may apply. Cannot be used in conjunction with another discount.

0cae9f0d-7f73-4726-8772-fb751690b60c.intro: Luxury homewares, wardrobe and little ones
0cae9f0d-7f73-4726-8772-fb751690b60c.description: The White Company began with a vision to combine stylish white homewares with the highest quality at affordable prices. What started as white linen-cupboard essentials has grown into a luxury lifestyle destination for the home, wardrobe and little ones.
0cae9f0d-7f73-4726-8772-fb751690b60c.instructions: Redeem your e-voucher at thewhitecompany.com or in store toward purchases, with the remaining balance deducted at each use. There are no limits on how many times it can be used until the balance reaches zero. The voucher is valid for 24 months from the date of last use, after which it expires. Check your balance in store, online at the UK balance check page, or by calling 020 375 89 222 from the UK.
0cae9f0d-7f73-4726-8772-fb751690b60c.terms: Gift E-Vouchers come in denominations of £5, from £5 up to £500. Valid for 24 months from date of last use, after which the remaining balance is forfeited; last use means activation or redemption. No limit on number of uses until the balance is £0.00; remaining balance is shown on your till receipt. Balance enquiries available in store, UK online, or by calling 020 375 89 222 (UK) / +44 20 375 89 222 (outside UK). The voucher remains the property of The White Company and may not be tampered with. Vouchers are dispatched by email once cleared payment is received.

80df7806-db5d-454f-84d6-c9a910327e40.intro: Everyday luxury and expert styling for women
80df7806-db5d-454f-84d6-c9a910327e40.description: White House Black Market celebrates and supports women with a collection of versatile, modern pieces, exceptional service and expert styling advice. 80df7806-db5d-454f-84d6-c9a910327e40.instructions: Shop online at WHBM.com and enter the gift card number and PIN at checkout, or call 877.948.2525 to order by phone with your card number and PIN. 80df7806-db5d-454f-84d6-c9a910327e40.terms: WHBM Gift Cards and eGift Cards may be redeemed at WHBM.com (US orders only), White House Black Market US boutiques and outlets, or by phone at 877.948.2525. The value of your purchase plus shipping, handling and tax is deducted from your balance. You may not add value back or redeem for cash except as required by law. Cards do not expire and have no fees. Safeguard your card number and PIN; the bearer is responsible for loss, damage or theft. Cards may be deactivated if issued or procured fraudulently. Distributed by a third party.

a59cc7ea-7a83-42c6-a85f-85af93406d41.intro: Everything for home improvement and trade
a59cc7ea-7a83-42c6-a85f-85af93406d41.description: Wickes is a trusted name in home improvement and the building trade, delivering quality brands and products at competitive prices alongside best-in-class service. a59cc7ea-7a83-42c6-a85f-85af93406d41.terms: For full terms and conditions, please visit https://www.wickes.co.uk/gifts.

4c43d124-6100-4e76-b431-a81c02ffd06c.description: For more than 60 years, Williams Sonoma has inspired creative cooking, relaxed gathering and comfortable everyday living. 4c43d124-6100-4e76-b431-a81c02ffd06c.instructions: Use this card to make purchases at williams-sonoma.com, by phone at 1-800-541-2233, or at participating Williams-Sonoma family stores in the US and Puerto Rico. 4c43d124-6100-4e76-b431-a81c02ffd06c.terms: Issued by Williams-Sonoma, Inc. and usable for purchases at US and Puerto Rico stores, by phone, or online with Williams Sonoma, Pottery Barn, Pottery Barn Kids, PBteen, Mark and Graham and West Elm. Visit williams-sonoma.com or call 1-800-846-9817 for balance inquiries.

a412a28a-d87d-4f1d-8b40-7ef0ecc3b061.intro: Gulf Coast seafood with Texas flavor
a412a28a-d87d-4f1d-8b40-7ef0ecc3b061.description: Willie G's is a Gulf Coast seafood and steak restaurant serving fresh fish, oysters and char-grilled cuts with a friendly, laid-back Houston vibe. Its menu blends regional seafood traditions with classic American favorites.
a412a28a-d87d-4f1d-8b40-7ef0ecc3b061.instructions: Present this Willie G's gift card when paying at the restaurant to apply its value toward your bill. Any remaining balance stays on the card for future visits.
a412a28a-d87d-4f1d-8b40-7ef0ecc3b061.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

db479b50-1500-4e18-a731-c71acf098251.description: Wine.com offers an online cellar of thousands of wines from around the world, with in-depth information about wineries and vintages to help you pick the right red, white, or rose. You can even track orders in a personalized virtual wine cellar.
db479b50-1500-4e18-a731-c71acf098251.instructions: Redeem your gift certificate at wine.com toward products listed in the online catalog. db479b50-1500-4e18-a731-c71acf098251.terms: Gift certificate cash value is 1/10 of one cent. Gift certificates and their use on wine.com are subject to wine.com's general Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. b3cf51ff-1bfd-4097-90c3-2f3f7adbdb0d.intro: Hand-picked wines delivered to your door
b3cf51ff-1bfd-4097-90c3-2f3f7adbdb0d.description: Wine52 is the fastest-growing wine club in the country, sending cases of gorgeous, hand-picked wines from different regions around the world. Choose reds, whites or a mix, with a copy of Glug magazine and two tasty snacks in every case.
b3cf51ff-1bfd-4097-90c3-2f3f7adbdb0d.instructions: Visit wine52.com and use your code to create an account, for new customers only. b3cf51ff-1bfd-4097-90c3-2f3f7adbdb0d.terms: 18+, UK only, expires one year after purchase. Further months are billed at £36/month with free postage. Full T&Cs at Wine52.com.

55029bd7-78ae-4a49-9ef7-85f4aca27972.description: Wingly is Europe's leading flight-sharing platform, connecting private pilots and passengers to share the cost of a flight and make private flying stunningly affordable. See your city, landscapes and coastlines from a whole new perspective.
55029bd7-78ae-4a49-9ef7-85f4aca27972.instructions: Redeem this voucher at wingly.io toward booking sightseeing or day-trip flights quoted in pounds sterling. If your flight costs less than the gift card value, the remaining credit stays on your card; if it costs more, pay the difference by bank card or PayPal. Gift cards cannot be combined with one another.
55029bd7-78ae-4a49-9ef7-85f4aca27972.terms: Wingly flights are cost-shared non-commercial flights, insured by Allianz. This voucher is restricted to booking flights quoted in pounds sterling. If your flight is cheaper than the gift card value, the remaining credit balance is stored on your gift card. If your flight exceeds the value, you can pay the difference via bank card or PayPal. Gift cards cannot be used in conjunction with one another.

b427547a-facc-439b-a4ac-11da895a3ecf.description: Since 1888, Wolferman's has been a proud purveyor of gourmet breads and pastries, from its famous super-thick English muffins to indulgent handcrafted cakes and pies. This gift card can also be redeemed across the nine brands of 1-800-Flowers.com.

6078b768-e84e-4058-be42-c776850fc7f7.description: WonderDays gift cards offer the gift of experiences over things, from high-speed drive days and immersive dining to cosy spa escapes and daredevil adventures. Help someone turn their one-day dream into a today reality.

6078b768-e84e-4058-be42-c776850fc7f7.terms: Treat this gift card like cash. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Valid for 24 months from issuance.

1fb30282-a9c3-4cea-b051-e22f75f9320a.terms: No credit card required. Use your active Game Pass membership to play games on Xbox One and Windows 10 PC, including Console Games, PC Games, and Xbox Live Gold. Game titles and number vary over time and by country. Except as required by law, codes are nonrefundable.

It offers casual everyday wardrobe staples for men, women and kids, including denim, tees, hoodies and basics, all at value pricing. Shoppers can browse exclusive factory styles in stores and online.
951c93f1-62f0-4721-b61f-c1e0e05fbc62.instructions: Use your Gap Factory credit in-store at any Gap Factory location or online at gapfactory.com.
951c93f1-62f0-4721-b61f-c1e0e05fbc62.terms: This gift card has no fees and no expiration date and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Keep your card safe, as lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

02bc4754-55d5-45bd-94ef-6b15e98fd144.description: Good Night Inns is a UK-wide collection of hotels and traditional coaching inns offering quality, consistent and affordable overnight stays. 02bc4754-55d5-45bd-94ef-6b15e98fd144.terms: This gift card is redeemable at participating Good Night Inns properties and is not exchangeable for cash. Standard terms and conditions apply, and lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

2f55a51b-28a4-43da-b4a9-7b8f11348ca3.terms: This gift card carries no fees and does not expire, and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

a7b2d3e3-68ce-4e43-b20f-78038a820898.intro: Your neighbourhood grocer, rooted in the community.
a7b2d3e3-68ce-4e43-b20f-78038a820898.description: IGA is a network of independent grocery stores in Canada supplied by Sobeys, with a strong presence across Quebec. Locally operated supermarkets offer fresh produce, meat, bakery, pantry staples and everyday essentials. The IGA and IGA Extra banners are a longstanding fixture of Canadian neighbourhood grocery shopping.

1579cc12-9962-4203-8998-ff63dfa63c42.intro: Scratch-made burgers, chicken and shakes, fast.

The menu features hand-breaded chicken, premium scratch-made burgers, fresh salads with house dressings and hand-spun milkshakes. Compact restaurants typically offer dine-in and drive-thru service.
1579cc12-9962-4203-8998-ff63dfa63c42.instructions: Use your Jaggers credit to order in-store or at the drive-thru at any participating Jaggers location, or online at eatjaggers.com.
1579cc12-9962-4203-8998-ff63dfa63c42.terms: This gift card is not redeemable for cash except where required by law and carries no expiration date or fees. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

8c40d92c-00aa-405c-9bde-b56e6fbfafdb.description: John Barras is a chain of traditional British pubs operated by Greene King. Venues serve classic pub food, a wide selection of beers, wines and spirits, and host sport and entertainment with a community feel. John Barras pubs are part of the Greene King family across the UK.

8c40d92c-00aa-405c-9bde-b56e6fbfafdb.terms: This gift card is redeemable at participating Greene King pubs including John Barras and is not exchangeable for cash. Standard terms and conditions apply, and lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

a8a065c5-eed1-4298-b4b5-bafdfecddeb4.intro: Curated home style with a designer's eye.

a8a065c5-eed1-4298-b4b5-bafdfecddeb4.terms: This gift card does not expire and carries no fees, and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

48bfef90-c52d-402f-9a53-a546d36021f1.intro: A taste of southern France in the heart of Toronto.

The restaurant celebrates southern French cuisine with tartares, whole-bird rotisserie, fresh seafood and a curated selection of cocktails and wines in an elegant setting. It is part of the Oliver & Bonacini family of restaurants.
48bfef90-c52d-402f-9a53-a546d36021f1.instructions: Use your La Plume credit toward dining at La Plume in Toronto and other participating Oliver & Bonacini restaurants; details at oliverbonacini.com.
48bfef90-c52d-402f-9a53-a546d36021f1.terms: This gift card is redeemable at participating Oliver & Bonacini restaurants including La Plume and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.
