ac7212c7-f558-4e8d-bb58-dbb4fdfd4f6c.instructions: Use your la Vie en Rose credit in-store at any participating la Vie en Rose location or online at lavieenrose.com.
ac7212c7-f558-4e8d-bb58-dbb4fdfd4f6c.terms: This gift card is not redeemable for cash except where required by law and carries no expiration date or fees. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

8489389c-aa9d-4b47-a87b-87b9aee5bbc4.intro: Ontario's destination for wine, beer and spirits.
8489389c-aa9d-4b47-a87b-87b9aee5bbc4.description: The LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) is one of the world's largest retailers of beverage alcohol, operating stores across Ontario, Canada. 8489389c-aa9d-4b47-a87b-87b9aee5bbc4.terms: This gift card is redeemable at LCBO stores in Ontario and is not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Valid identification is required for alcohol purchases, and lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

f9b1e588-fe45-48b8-b677-e31752cffcc5.intro: Québécois-rooted brasserie dining and après at Mont-Tremblant.
f9b1e588-fe45-48b8-b677-e31752cffcc5.description: Léo Boire + Manger is a chef-driven brasserie at Le Westin Tremblant in Quebec, operated by Oliver & Bonacini Hospitality. The seasonal menu blends Québécois traditions with global influences, ranging from fresh seafood to hearty steaks. By night the room transforms into a lively après-ski setting with curated wines, spirits, and signature cocktails.

6e7465a6-26cb-4e79-8cbd-f3140ce35ce3.intro: Quebec's neighbourhood grocery, all fresh and very close.
6e7465a6-26cb-4e79-8cbd-f3140ce35ce3.description: Les Marchés Tradition is a Quebec-based chain of neighbourhood grocery stores operating across the province. Its stores emphasize freshness, devoting much of the sales floor to fruits and vegetables, meat, bakery, deli, cheese, and prepared meals. The banner positions itself as a local, community-minded alternative to larger supermarkets.
6e7465a6-26cb-4e79-8cbd-f3140ce35ce3.instructions: Use your Les Marchés Tradition credit in-store at any participating Les Marchés Tradition grocery location across Quebec. Present your card at checkout to apply your balance toward your purchase. Find a store at marchestradition.com.

5a7a8b78-6287-4551-8d28-9535d565aaa2.terms: Redeemable toward merchandise at LOFT Outlet stores and online, and not redeemable for cash except where required by law. Treat this card like cash; it will not be replaced if lost or stolen.

13341f35-aa96-4e49-8bd0-f6b25890e426.instructions: Use your Lou & Grey credit online at loft.com or in-store at LOFT locations carrying the Lou & Grey collection. Present the card at checkout or enter the code online to apply your balance.
13341f35-aa96-4e49-8bd0-f6b25890e426.terms: Redeemable toward Lou & Grey merchandise and not exchangeable for cash except where required by law. Treat this card like cash; lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

Founded in Chicago in 1991 and now owned by Brinker International, it serves generous, often family-style portions of pasta, chicken, seafood, and signature desserts. Locations offer lunch, dinner, carryout, and banquet spaces.

590dd927-6b20-4607-99ec-602e5ee18aae.description: Margaux is a stylish lobby bar and lounge at Le Westin Tremblant in Quebec, operated by Oliver & Bonacini Hospitality. 590dd927-6b20-4607-99ec-602e5ee18aae.instructions: Use your Margaux credit when ordering at the Margaux lounge at Le Westin Tremblant in Mont-Tremblant, Quebec. Present your card or balance to staff at the time of payment. For details, visit oliverbonacini.com.
590dd927-6b20-4607-99ec-602e5ee18aae.terms: Valid toward food and beverages at Margaux and cannot be redeemed for cash except where required by law. Treat this card like cash; it will not be replaced if lost or stolen.

7ed0c923-95f6-4a31-851f-de058c300cc2.description: Metropolitan Pub Company is a collection of more than 60 premium, independent-feeling pubs in and around London, operated by Greene King. Each venue keeps its own distinctive character while serving food, drinks, and a welcoming local atmosphere.

13cbd933-a4a7-4cd9-9977-054544d67b6e.instructions: Use your Mountain Hardwear credit online at mountainhardwear.com or in-store at any Mountain Hardwear retail location. Enter the code at online checkout or present the card in store to apply your balance.
13cbd933-a4a7-4cd9-9977-054544d67b6e.terms: Redeemable toward merchandise at Mountain Hardwear and not exchangeable for cash except where required by law. Treat this card like cash; lost or stolen cards will not be replaced.

64e71f89-ee62-4b3c-adfb-813df9bb1cdd.description: MR MIKES SteakhouseCasual is a Canadian casual-dining chain founded in Vancouver in 1960. It serves Canada AAA steaks alongside casual staples like ribs, pasta, and stir-fry in a relaxed setting that splits locations between a family dining room and the brand's urbanLODGE lounge. 372d2baa-4f20-4287-96df-ac8b2facd3f4.description: Needs is a chain of convenience stores throughout Atlantic Canada whose trademark is owned by Sobeys. fdc237d8-ff38-484d-999d-348e80267ad9.description: Old English Inns is a collection of traditional inns and pub hotels operated by Greene King across the UK. 9466b0dd-8d1b-4bdd-b5ea-23467932042d.description: Oliver & Bonacini Café Grill is a casual-upscale restaurant concept within the Oliver & Bonacini Hospitality group in Canada. 9466b0dd-8d1b-4bdd-b5ea-23467932042d.instructions: Use your Oliver & Bonacini Café Grill credit when dining in at any Oliver & Bonacini Café Grill location in Ontario. Present your card or balance to your server at the time of payment. For details, visit obcafegrill.com.

049ee347-0799-47a1-9682-ea79ed893475.description: Otter Avenue is a toddler-focused apparel brand from Carter's, designed around the real-life needs of toddlers and their parents. c2b7c5f3-79ee-4cd2-8344-009e65d23099.description: Paddy Flaherty's is an Irish pub and restaurant in Sarnia, Ontario, with an interior built in Ireland and reassembled on the waterfront. c2b7c5f3-79ee-4cd2-8344-009e65d23099.instructions: Use your Paddy Flaherty's credit in person to pay for food and drinks at the pub in Sarnia, Ontario. Present your gift card or code to your server when settling the bill.

3b8123ba-d0ca-4f89-8234-73177c9ae9a2.intro: Canada's fast-growing Middle Eastern restaurant chain.
3b8123ba-d0ca-4f89-8234-73177c9ae9a2.description: Paramount Fine Foods is a Canadian restaurant chain serving Lebanese and Middle Eastern cuisine, with dozens of locations concentrated in the Greater Toronto Area. 3b8123ba-d0ca-4f89-8234-73177c9ae9a2.terms: Redeemable for food and beverages at participating Paramount Fine Foods locations. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law, and the card should be safeguarded like cash.

c800494d-a6bd-4e79-82b3-0b3fac2e5048.intro: Stylish neighbourhood Italian dining in North York.
c800494d-a6bd-4e79-82b3-0b3fac2e5048.description: Parcheggio is an Italian restaurant in Toronto's North York from Oliver & Bonacini Hospitality. c800494d-a6bd-4e79-82b3-0b3fac2e5048.instructions: Use your Parcheggio credit to settle your bill in person at the restaurant in North York, Toronto. Present your gift card or code to your server when paying.
c800494d-a6bd-4e79-82b3-0b3fac2e5048.terms: Redeemable for food and beverages at Parcheggio. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law, and the card should be treated like cash as it cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

aef13e9b-ca92-4b02-a628-88dc8c89ab0c.description: PBteen (Pottery Barn Teen) is the teen-focused brand from Williams-Sonoma, specializing in bedroom and lounge furniture, bedding, lighting, rugs, and wall decor. 66ae6240-eca3-4875-acf8-6dfe16fe755e.instructions: Use your Thrifty Foods credit in store at any participating Thrifty Foods location, or at other participating Sobeys-family stores. Learn more at thriftyfoods.com.
66ae6240-eca3-4875-acf8-6dfe16fe755e.terms: Valid toward in-store purchases at participating locations and cannot be redeemed for cash except where required by law. Gift cards do not expire; treat the card like cash, as it cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

08129c93-f55f-4bec-82e5-7449dcf6bb2e.intro: A traditional Irish pub in the heart of Kingston.
08129c93-f55f-4bec-82e5-7449dcf6bb2e.description: Tir nan Og is an Irish pub in Kingston, Ontario, serving hearty pub fare, craft and Irish beers, and a lively atmosphere with live music. It is a long-standing local gathering spot known for its authentic Irish hospitality.
08129c93-f55f-4bec-82e5-7449dcf6bb2e.instructions: Use your Tir nan Og credit in person at the pub when dining in or settling your bill.
08129c93-f55f-4bec-82e5-7449dcf6bb2e.terms: Redeemable toward food and beverage purchases at the pub and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Keep the card secure, as lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced.

c59c0968-1f79-4a07-8e92-3d1277750c76.intro: Texas grocery tradition rooted in community since 1916.
c59c0968-1f79-4a07-8e92-3d1277750c76.description: United Supermarkets, part of The United Family and Albertsons Companies, is a Texas-based grocery chain serving communities across Texas and New Mexico. It offers fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, and full grocery selections with a strong focus on local service.
c59c0968-1f79-4a07-8e92-3d1277750c76.instructions: Use your United Supermarkets credit in store at any participating United Supermarkets location. Learn more at unitedsupermarkets.com.
c59c0968-1f79-4a07-8e92-3d1277750c76.terms: Valid toward in-store purchases at participating locations and cannot be redeemed for cash except where required by law. Treat the card like cash, as it cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

1c4ea982-49e4-4e38-8c42-186e3a84f226.intro: Iconic British airline with a flair for the skies.
1c4ea982-49e4-4e38-8c42-186e3a84f226.description: Virgin Atlantic is a British airline operating long-haul flights from the UK to destinations across the Americas, Caribbean, Africa, the Middle East, and Asia. Known for its distinctive service and style, it connects travellers worldwide alongside its Flying Club loyalty programme.
1c4ea982-49e4-4e38-8c42-186e3a84f226.instructions: Use your Virgin Atlantic credit toward flight bookings at virginatlantic.com, subject to the airline's booking terms.
1c4ea982-49e4-4e38-8c42-186e3a84f226.terms: Redeemable toward eligible flight bookings and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Keep the credit details secure, as they cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

4ac2c56a-d029-4b22-af85-ffca14c82dcc.intro: Tailor-made getaways from the Virgin Atlantic name.
4ac2c56a-d029-4b22-af85-ffca14c82dcc.description: Virgin Atlantic Holidays is the package-holiday arm of Virgin Atlantic, combining flights, hotels, and experiences into curated trips. It offers tailor-made escapes to destinations across the Caribbean, USA, Africa, and beyond.
4ac2c56a-d029-4b22-af85-ffca14c82dcc.instructions: Use your Virgin Atlantic Holidays credit toward holiday packages booked at virginatlanticholidays.co.uk, subject to booking terms.
4ac2c56a-d029-4b22-af85-ffca14c82dcc.terms: Redeemable toward eligible holiday bookings and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Keep the credit details secure, as they cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

c087665c-9e14-49f9-9fda-63cc51da4205.intro: Soar over Britain in an iconic Virgin hot air balloon.
c087665c-9e14-49f9-9fda-63cc51da4205.description: Virgin Balloon Flights offers hot air balloon rides from over 100 launch sites across the UK. Each experience includes around an hour aloft, a Prosecco toast after landing, and a flight certificate, making it a memorable gift for special occasions.
c087665c-9e14-49f9-9fda-63cc51da4205.instructions: Use your Virgin Balloon Flights credit toward balloon ride vouchers and experiences booked at virginballoonflights.co.uk.
c087665c-9e14-49f9-9fda-63cc51da4205.terms: Redeemable toward balloon flight bookings and experiences and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Keep the voucher details secure, as they cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

84df0490-e8a8-47a6-b277-b639374d8e2c.intro: Richard Branson's collection of extraordinary luxury retreats.
84df0490-e8a8-47a6-b277-b639374d8e2c.description: Virgin Limited Edition is an award-winning collection of luxury hotels and retreats handpicked by Richard Branson, including Necker Island and Moskito Island in the British Virgin Islands, Kasbah Tamadot in Morocco, and Mahali Mzuri in Kenya. Each property offers a unique escape in a remarkable setting.
84df0490-e8a8-47a6-b277-b639374d8e2c.instructions: Use your Virgin Limited Edition credit toward stays and bookings at the retreats via virginlimitededition.com, subject to availability and booking terms.
84df0490-e8a8-47a6-b277-b639374d8e2c.terms: Redeemable toward eligible stays and bookings and cannot be exchanged for cash except where required by law. Keep the credit details secure, as they cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

5aee6989-0b90-4965-ad6f-673cdf23a5fa.intro: Premium cookware and gourmet goods for the home chef.
5aee6989-0b90-4965-ad6f-673cdf23a5fa.description: Williams Sonoma is a US home and kitchen retailer offering premium cookware, kitchen tools, small appliances, and gourmet food and entertaining essentials. It is a destination for home cooks seeking quality brands and curated culinary products.
5aee6989-0b90-4965-ad6f-673cdf23a5fa.instructions: Use your Williams Sonoma credit online at williams-sonoma.com or in person at participating Williams Sonoma stores in the U.S.
5aee6989-0b90-4965-ad6f-673cdf23a5fa.terms: Valid toward merchandise purchases online and in participating stores and cannot be redeemed for cash except where required by law. Keep the card secure, as it cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.

cbbff21d-3072-49cd-a44d-11a3e63b9918.intro: Fast, fresh fashion for women and men, dropping daily.
cbbff21d-3072-49cd-a44d-11a3e63b9918.description: Boohoo is a British online fashion retailer aimed at younger shoppers, famous for affordable, trend-led clothing released in hundreds of new styles every day. Its own-brand range spans womenswear, menswear, footwear and accessories. Everything is sold online and delivered worldwide.
cbbff21d-3072-49cd-a44d-11a3e63b9918.instructions: Use your Boohoo credit online at boohoo.com. Apply the gift card balance at checkout to pay for your order.
cbbff21d-3072-49cd-a44d-11a3e63b9918.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to the standard terms and conditions set by Boohoo. Check your remaining balance before redeeming.

22009ad4-d752-45f1-8e11-cd60fb3b55d3.intro: Comfortable, everyday fashion at honest prices.
22009ad4-d752-45f1-8e11-cd60fb3b55d3.description: C&A is one of Europe's oldest and largest fashion retailers, offering quality ready-to-wear clothing for women, men and children. The brand is known for affordable everyday styles, denim and family essentials across its many stores and online shop. Founded in 1841, it remains a high-street staple across Europe.
22009ad4-d752-45f1-8e11-cd60fb3b55d3.instructions: Use your C&A credit in-store at any C&A location or online at c-and-a.com. Present the gift card at the till or enter the code at checkout.
22009ad4-d752-45f1-8e11-cd60fb3b55d3.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to C&A's standard terms and conditions. Any unused balance remains on the card until the expiry date.

8d9142ee-fa41-4b38-be48-38386c644b12.intro: Europe's beauty destination for fragrance, makeup and skincare.
8d9142ee-fa41-4b38-be48-38386c644b12.description: Douglas is a leading European premium beauty retailer offering a wide selection of perfumes, cosmetics, skincare and hair care. It carries both prestige and niche brands across its stores and online shop. Founded in 1821, Douglas is the go-to name for beauty across more than twenty European markets.
8d9142ee-fa41-4b38-be48-38386c644b12.instructions: Use your Douglas credit in-store at any Douglas location or online at douglas.de. Present the gift card at the counter or enter the code at checkout.
8d9142ee-fa41-4b38-be48-38386c644b12.terms: Gift cards cannot be redeemed for cash and are subject to Douglas's standard terms and conditions. Please check your balance before use.

9542e729-9f3a-47b2-8dae-0a66cc13c64f.intro: Luxury accessories rescued from decommissioned fire hose.
9542e729-9f3a-47b2-8dae-0a66cc13c64f.description: Elvis & Kresse is a British sustainable luxury brand that transforms reclaimed materials, most notably decommissioned London fire hose, into handcrafted bags, wallets, belts and accessories. Every piece is made in the UK and built to last, with a portion of profits donated to firefighter charities. It pairs genuine craftsmanship with a strong circular-economy mission.
9542e729-9f3a-47b2-8dae-0a66cc13c64f.instructions: Use your Elvis & Kresse credit online at elvisandkresse.com. Apply the gift card balance at checkout to pay for your order.
9542e729-9f3a-47b2-8dae-0a66cc13c64f.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to Elvis & Kresse's standard terms and conditions. Any unused balance remains on the card.

beb17fc1-8702-485c-b648-b0ab2ce9a8ad.intro: Cold-water surf and outdoor gear, built to last.
beb17fc1-8702-485c-b648-b0ab2ce9a8ad.description: Finisterre is a Cornwall-based outdoor and surf apparel brand founded in 2003 to design functional clothing for cold-water adventurers. Its range covers wetsuits, waterproof jackets, merino base layers, knitwear and everyday wear, all with a strong sustainability focus. The brand is known for durable, responsibly made products built for the sea and the outdoors.
beb17fc1-8702-485c-b648-b0ab2ce9a8ad.instructions: Use your Finisterre credit in-store at any Finisterre location or online at finisterre.com. Present the gift card in store or enter the code at checkout.
beb17fc1-8702-485c-b648-b0ab2ce9a8ad.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to Finisterre's standard terms and conditions. Please check your remaining balance before redeeming.

b69398a1-39f1-4480-8943-d9eff06265eb.intro: Germany's flagship department store, online and in-store.
b69398a1-39f1-4480-8943-d9eff06265eb.description: Galeria is Germany's largest department store group, formed from the merger of Galeria Kaufhof and Karstadt. It offers a broad assortment spanning fashion, beauty, homeware, electronics and food across its stores and online shop. It remains a landmark name on the German high street.
b69398a1-39f1-4480-8943-d9eff06265eb.instructions: Use your Galeria credit in-store at any Galeria location or online at galeria.de. Present the gift card at the till or enter the code at checkout.
b69398a1-39f1-4480-8943-d9eff06265eb.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to Galeria's standard terms and conditions. Any unused balance stays on the card until expiry.

5f3ca703-ba89-4e9e-b975-9f7d54848978.intro: European lingerie specialist for every body.
5f3ca703-ba89-4e9e-b975-9f7d54848978.description: Hunkemöller is one of Europe's largest lingerie specialists, offering bras, knickers, swimwear, nightwear and loungewear. The brand spans everyday basics through to feminine and statement sets, designed by its in-house team. It serves customers across Europe through its stores and online shop.
5f3ca703-ba89-4e9e-b975-9f7d54848978.instructions: Use your Hunkemöller credit in-store at any Hunkemöller location or online at hunkemoller.co.uk. Present the gift card in store or enter the code at checkout.
5f3ca703-ba89-4e9e-b975-9f7d54848978.terms: Gift cards cannot be redeemed for cash and are subject to Hunkemöller's standard terms and conditions. Please check your balance before use.

6e55bd8e-d5db-407e-98fa-97e72b0ce950.intro: Contemporary menswear, from denim to tailoring.
6e55bd8e-d5db-407e-98fa-97e72b0ce950.description: Jack & Jones is a popular menswear brand offering everyday clothing, footwear and accessories with a strong focus on denim. Its range mixes casual basics with smarter tailored pieces for younger men. The brand is sold across Europe through its own stores and online shop.
6e55bd8e-d5db-407e-98fa-97e72b0ce950.instructions: Use your Jack & Jones credit in-store at any Jack & Jones location or online at jackjones.com. Present the gift card at the till or enter the code at checkout.
6e55bd8e-d5db-407e-98fa-97e72b0ce950.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to Jack & Jones's standard terms and conditions. Any unused balance remains on the card.

129f9087-eb9a-4276-b879-69272562fc13.intro: Timeless, sophisticated womenswear for every occasion.
129f9087-eb9a-4276-b879-69272562fc13.description: Karen Millen is a British womenswear label founded in 1981, known for elevated, occasion-ready fashion. Its collections span dresses, tailored coats, blazers, trousers and knitwear designed for a polished, sophisticated look. The brand sells online with a focus on premium, statement pieces.
129f9087-eb9a-4276-b879-69272562fc13.instructions: Use your Karen Millen credit online at karenmillen.com. Apply the gift card balance at checkout to pay for your order.
129f9087-eb9a-4276-b879-69272562fc13.terms: Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are subject to Karen Millen's standard terms and conditions. Please check your remaining balance before redeeming.

c58dc564-42ed-4bf3-ae22-f03279c7b3a8.intro: Reusable bottles that pull plastic out of the ocean with every sip.
c58dc564-42ed-4bf3-ae22-f03279c7b3a8.description: Ocean Bottle is a B Corp brand making reusable, insulated stainless steel water bottles built largely from recycled materials. Each purchase funds the collection of ocean-bound plastic, pairing everyday hydration with measurable environmental impact. The range spans the original bottle, larger formats and travel-friendly brew lids, all designed to be refilled for years.
c58dc564-42ed-4bf3-ae22-f03279c7b3a8.instructions: Use your Ocean Bottle credit online at oceanbottle.co to shop reusable bottles, accessories and gifting options.
c58dc564-42ed-4bf3-ae22-f03279c7b3a8.terms: Gift card value is redeemable toward purchases and cannot be exchanged for cash. Unless stated otherwise, the balance is non-refundable and non-transferable.

b0257798-f8f7-4093-aded-5dcc7017086d.description: ONLY is a Danish fashion label, part of the Bestseller group, known for affordable casual clothing and accessories aimed at young women. Originating as a denim brand, it has grown into a wide range of jeans, dresses, tops and outerwear sold across hundreds of stores and online. The collections focus on trend-driven, wearable styles at accessible prices.
b0257798-f8f7-4093-aded-5dcc7017086d.instructions: Use your ONLY credit in-store at any ONLY location or online at only.com.
b0257798-f8f7-4093-aded-5dcc7017086d.terms: Gift card balance is redeemable against purchases and may not be exchanged for cash. The card is non-reloadable unless otherwise specified and any unused balance remains on the card.

fbce79bf-2e1d-44d7-a77f-f0eb7c56f8e9.description: PrettyLittleThing, often shortened to PLT, is a Manchester-based fast-fashion retailer specialising in women's clothing, dresses and accessories. The brand is known for affordable, of-the-moment styles ranging from going-out looks to loungewear and footwear. New drops land frequently, keeping the catalogue closely aligned with the latest trends.
fbce79bf-2e1d-44d7-a77f-f0eb7c56f8e9.instructions: Use your PrettyLittleThing credit online at prettylittlething.com to shop the latest women's fashion and accessories.
fbce79bf-2e1d-44d7-a77f-f0eb7c56f8e9.terms: Gift card value applies to purchases only and cannot be redeemed for cash. The balance is non-transferable and is valid until used in accordance with the retailer's standard terms.

5a0936f2-3cb2-40f3-927a-080a70bec1ee.intro: The world's leading inflatable stand-up paddle boards.
5a0936f2-3cb2-40f3-927a-080a70bec1ee.description: Red Paddle Co is a British brand and certified B Corp that pioneers premium inflatable stand-up paddle boards. Since 2008 it has built durable, high-performance iSUPs alongside paddles, changing robes, bags and accessories for paddlers of all levels. The boards are designed for serious performance while still packing down for easy transport and storage.
5a0936f2-3cb2-40f3-927a-080a70bec1ee.instructions: Use your Red Paddle Co credit online at red-equipment.co.uk to shop inflatable paddle boards and accessories.
5a0936f2-3cb2-40f3-927a-080a70bec1ee.terms: Gift card balance is redeemable toward purchases and cannot be exchanged for cash. Unless otherwise stated, the card is non-refundable and non-transferable.

ab764aed-d978-457f-98f6-72802b295e3f.intro: Award-winning craft beer brewed from surplus bread.
ab764aed-d978-457f-98f6-72802b295e3f.description: Toast Brewing is a UK craft brewery that turns surplus bakery bread into beer, cutting food waste with every brew. Its range of ales and lagers blends rescued bread with malted barley, hops and yeast, and the company directs its profits to charities tackling environmental causes. It is a purpose-led brand pairing quality craft beer with a circular-economy mission.
ab764aed-d978-457f-98f6-72802b295e3f.instructions: Use your Toast Brewing credit online at toastbrewing.com to order craft beer for UK delivery.
ab764aed-d978-457f-98f6-72802b295e3f.terms: Gift card value is redeemable against purchases only and cannot be exchanged for cash. Alcohol purchases are restricted to customers of legal drinking age; the balance is non-transferable.

51f4a351-2a0f-4c0e-86c6-4e174b8f7113.intro: Modern Danish womenswear for every wardrobe.
51f4a351-2a0f-4c0e-86c6-4e174b8f7113.description: Vero Moda is a Danish women's fashion brand within the Bestseller family, offering contemporary clothing, footwear and accessories. The collections cover everything from refined basics and tailoring to dresses, jeans and seasonal trends. Its chic, modern aesthetic is sold across stores worldwide and online.
51f4a351-2a0f-4c0e-86c6-4e174b8f7113.instructions: Use your Vero Moda credit in-store at any Vero Moda location or online at veromoda.com.
51f4a351-2a0f-4c0e-86c6-4e174b8f7113.terms: Gift card balance is redeemable toward purchases and may not be exchanged for cash. The card is non-transferable and any remaining balance stays on the card until used.

4407928b-3e3e-46be-a368-7dd52ef3cc77.intro: Wide, thin and flexible footwear designed to feel like barefoot.
4407928b-3e3e-46be-a368-7dd52ef3cc77.description: Vivobarefoot is a British footwear brand making minimalist, barefoot-style shoes that are wide, thin and flexible to support natural foot movement. Its range spans everyday, running, hiking and training shoes crafted with natural and recycled materials and built to be repaired and recycled. The focus is on foot health and a closer-to-the-ground walking experience.
4407928b-3e3e-46be-a368-7dd52ef3cc77.instructions: Use your Vivobarefoot credit online at vivobarefoot.com to shop barefoot shoes for men, women and kids.
4407928b-3e3e-46be-a368-7dd52ef3cc77.terms: Gift card value applies to purchases only and cannot be redeemed for cash. Unless otherwise stated, the balance is non-refundable and non-transferable.

85fb1d10-e092-4efd-9070-a7150aee0e9f.intro: In-house designed fashion for men, women and kids.
85fb1d10-e092-4efd-9070-a7150aee0e9f.description: WE Fashion is an international clothing brand from the Netherlands that has been designing modern apparel since 1917. All of its menswear, womenswear and kidswear is created in-house, with collections sold across European stores and online in more than twenty countries. The brand offers versatile, contemporary essentials for the whole family.
85fb1d10-e092-4efd-9070-a7150aee0e9f.instructions: Use your WE Fashion credit in-store at any WE Fashion location or online at wefashion.com.
85fb1d10-e092-4efd-9070-a7150aee0e9f.terms: Gift card balance is redeemable against purchases and cannot be exchanged for cash. The card is non-transferable and any unused balance remains valid for future purchases.

c7f9fbe2-db0d-49fd-a7b9-c7022fc46c4a.intro: Refillable natural deodorant and bathroom essentials without the plastic waste.
c7f9fbe2-db0d-49fd-a7b9-c7022fc46c4a.description: Wild is a UK brand making refillable, natural deodorant alongside body wash, hand wash and lip balm. Its reusable aluminium cases pair with plant-based, compostable refills to cut single-use plastic, while the formulas are vegan, cruelty-free and designed for sensitive skin. The subscription-friendly model lets customers reorder refills as and when they need them.
c7f9fbe2-db0d-49fd-a7b9-c7022fc46c4a.instructions: Use your Wild credit online at wearewild.com to shop refillable deodorant cases, refills and body care.
c7f9fbe2-db0d-49fd-a7b9-c7022fc46c4a.terms: Gift card value is redeemable toward purchases only and cannot be exchanged for cash. Unless otherwise stated, the balance is non-refundable and non-transferable.
